Legislative Update for Week Ending April 7, 2023

Happy Easter from the NEGOP! We encourage you to spend time reflecting and praying on the wonderful gift we received! The Unicameral was busy on big issues to start the week but advanced to less “hot issue” business towards the end of the week. Let’s dive in... Taxes After a monumental achievement in income taxes last week, Republicans brought forth a monumental property tax relief bill on Monday. Property tax relief has been a major goal of Senator Briese for years and it was a momentous day for his work. The bill moved on to Select File and has two more rounds to go. There was a merited debate on...‘Why file to get a refund instead of not paying in the money...’ held on the floor. However, the bill stands as is. Senators in favor of the EPIC plan showed strong commitment to these bills as they represent progress on tax relief. They took a portion of discussion time to push for bigger reforms to the system. Senator Halloran gave a strong speech in favor of EPIC tax. “One of the principles of taxation is you get more of what to incentivize and less of what you tax. What do you think you get when you give to those who don’t work and you tax income which is productivity? I will continue to support consumption tax which does not tax productivity”, Holleran stated. On a federal level, tax fallout continues in DC. As most of conservative America was tuned into the weaponization of the Justice System against Trump, the discussion continues to grow on Biden’s proposal to increase federal spending by approximately $500 billion (quickly approaching $7 TRILLION) and new taxes of $4.7 “T”rillion! The NEGOP encourages our federal delegation to honor Nancy Reagan’s legacy and “Just say No!”. There is no compromise to $4.7 trillion in new taxes. School Funding After property tax reform concluded, the Senators moved into debating Senator Sander’s bill (on behalf of the Governor) on school funding reform. School funding reform brings forth discussion on who has the most input on these bills and Republicans should encourage Senators to listen to the people. At the end of the day the bill passed 39-3. There were some amendments proposed and supported by Republicans that frustrated Republicans including the Governor. Diplomacy is a messy process in 2023. However, diplomacy surrounding our Conservative Values IS a necessary process to aid in “Big Wins” for the people. Historical wins on a variety of bills with no vote being able to go to waste is the situation we are in. Debate continues behind the scenes on school funding. Support for a variety of bills (some unrelated to these four bills) are needed to keep the coalition together for big wins outside of taxes. It is IMPORTANT to note that the conversation of “Respect the Package” has been prevalent this week. In summary, a historical bundled set of bills, often referred to as an Omnibus package in DC, was debated on income taxes, property taxes, school growth spending caps, and school funding. The package has been respected to date. The NEGOP has received numerous calls on ‘why was the amendment introduced?’ or ‘why discuss/support this new clause?’. The truth is that historical tax reform is not simple. There were opportunities to bring forth a sense of harmony to accomplish the bigger goal of tax relief, funding reform, and other critical issues outside of taxes. There are elements that may not match the NEGOP Legislative Plan, but we have seen necessary diplomacy to advance bigger goals and achieve Big Wins. Lincoln Elections Lincoln held their primary city elections this week. We need every Republican outside of the Star City to connect with their family/friends in Lincoln and demand they vote in the general election. One month is a quick turnaround between the primary and general! Mayor, City Council, Airport Boards, and School Boards are all on the line. Lincoln is still under the Emergency Authority of the Mayor from 3 years ago. (THREE years...Yes...that is reality). We need a functioning government that responds to the citizens and observes, not overrides, the City Charter or State Statutes. The turnout numbers were decent for Republicans. However, we are still in a neck-and-neck race. Republicans need an AMAZING turnout for the General election. Ballots will be mailed beginning April 17th. The NEGOP introduced a documentary series highlighting the erosion of Lincoln, titled "Lincoln in Decline". Full video viewings are being planned with church groups and grassroots organizations. If you have an interest in setting up a venue and viewing for a group, reach out to chairman@ne.gop. Chapter #1 already has 109k impressions and almost 21,000 views on Twitter alone. Subscribe to the NEGOP Twitter account to see the videos. Please share these productions on social media to educate Lincolnites and Nebraskans on the policies and choices of the Democrat mayor that have weakened the Capital City. Lincoln is the entry point...Nebraska is the target. Lincoln will look like San Francisco or Portland in under five years if we don't STAND now. Nebraska, like California, will not be far behind in crumbling.
Unfortunately, the liberal media is manipulating the narrative in the Star City by suppressing information (Lincoln had a 50-bullet shootout in the Haymarket this past weekend that was buried by the press for days) FOR the benefit of the Mayor. Two vehicles and five different businesses were impacted by this violent criminal activity. The citizens need to speak directly to each other with a complicit media in weak coverage to change the trajectory of Lincoln. Senator Geist Resigns to Focus on Mayoral Race and Senator Bosn Steps Up With the Speaker announcing sessions will go long into the night and Senator Geist in a neck and neck race for Mayor, Suzanne decided to go “All In” for Lincoln. She resigned her position as Senator to solely focus on the Mayor race and be the conservative voice for the citizens of Lincoln, freeing them from infrastructure decline, crime, and unilateral rule. If you can help with the NEGOP statewide Day of Action in Lincoln on Saturday, April 29, please click here: https://m.signupgenius.com/#!/showSignUp/10c0e48abae23a0f5c43-days With the vacancy in the Legislature, Governor Pillen appointed Senator Bosn, a native of Columbus who now lives in Lincoln, to represent LD 25. Senator Bosn was an attorney for Lancaster County six years ago and became a stay at home mom. She is an adjunct professor at the College of Law (UNL). We are looking forward to working with Senator Bosn in the legislature. Finally, we are grateful for a candidate like Stan Parker to be in our party and endorsing Suzanne after the election. Stan is a change agent for good with a bright future in Lincoln! $100+ Million Unaccounted for by DHHS Earlier this session, State Auditor Mike Foley revealed $15 million in accounting errors with the Department of Transportation. This week, he provided a bombshell report showing $135 MILLION of taxpayers dollars were accounted for improperly by the Department of Health and Human Services. The last SEVEN AUDITS show the same problems. The real question is where is the enforcement? We need a government that will follow the laws, but also a government that will enforce the laws on the book and not give passes to departments failing SEVEN AUDITS on the same issue. Taxpayer money needs to be recovered by the taxpayers. Decency and the ACTUAL rules on Cloture The NEGOP applauds Senator Armandariz and Senator Jacobsen for speaking out against the hateful rhetoric and inappropriate comments made by the filibustering Senators this week. Cussing on the mic, calling Senators names, etc. The response was warranted. Part of the problem with distasteful speech on the floor is that Senators are given so much time to speak on each bill and inevitably abuse that time with poor choices in words. The hours a bill must be heard is discretionary. The chamber is under the impression that 8 hours are needed for General File, 4 hours for Select File, and 2 hours for Final Reading However, that is not the rule they agreed to. Cloture (a rule to end debate on the bill) can be invoked without a specific set amount of time the debate. Sec. 10. Cloture. At any stage of consideration the principal introducer of the bill under consideration, a co-introducer with the consent of the principal introducer, or the chairperson of the committee, if the bill is introduced by that committee, may move for cloture to the presiding officer; however, the presiding officer may rule such motion for cloture out of order if, in presiding officer's opinion, a full and fair debate has not been afforded. Such ruling by the presiding officer shall not be subject to challenge. Whenever a motion for cloture is offered, the presiding officer shall immediately recognize such introducer or chairperson and shall then order debate on the pending amendment or motion to cease. A vote on the cloture motion shall be taken immediately. A two-thirds majority of the elected members shall be required for the cloture motion to be successful. A motion for cloture shall be in order except while a member is speaking, and a motion for cloture is not debatable. If the motion for cloture is successful, a vote on the pending matter shall be taken immediately, without debate. .... A motion for cloture shall have precedence over all other motions except a motion to recess or adjourn. A motion for cloture which fails for lack of sufficient votes shall result in the debate on the bill ending for the day. When the Speaker chooses to resume debate on the bill, successive motions for cloture shall not be in order until two additional hours of debate on the bill has occurred. If the presiding officer rejects a motion for cloture on a bill due to lack of full and fair debate, successive motions for cloture on the bill may be offered at any time. If we are discussing Senator Cavanaugh’s coffee mug collection, Senator Hunt needing a calculator to multiply numbers by 10, their feelings on ‘rights’ that are not germane to the bill on the floor, and whatever else they are talking about...it is clear a full and fair debate on the bill has been afforded. A cloture vote should occur and be granted. The vote on the final bill can then occur and the next bill can be heard. Cloture is CRITICAL for Republicans if more productive legislation is going to be passed this year. It is critical for Republicans to stand united on each cloture vote regardless if they agree with the bill or not so that more bills of critical importance can be heard and potentially passed this session by seeing the floor. The people's work needs to be done. Correction of Last Week’s Edition
Last week I wrote the following:
“The NEGOP Platform outlines that citizens should be charged fees to exercise their rights.” This was a typo.
To be clear, the NEGOP believes that citizens should NOT be charged fees to exercise their rights. Until Next Week... Todd WatsonNEGOP Political Director political@ne.gop

clean_body: Legislative Update for Week Ending April 7, 2023 Happy Easter from the NEGOP! We encourage you to spend time reflecting and praying on the w | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | 108th Legislative Session"2ND HOUSE ALERT/WEEKLY UPDATE"April 8, 2023 | | | | | | | | | | Get Our Second House Alerts | | | | | | | Legislative Update for Week Ending April 7, 2023 Happy Easter from the NEGOP! We encourage you to spend time reflecting and praying on the wonderful gift we received! The Unicameral was busy on big issues to start the week but advanced to less “hot issue” business towards the end of the week. Let’s dive in... Taxes After a monumental achievement in income taxes last week, Republicans brought forth a monumental property tax relief bill on Monday. Property tax relief has been a major goal of Senator Briese for years and it was a momentous day for his work. The bill moved on to Select File and has two more rounds to go. There was a merited debate on...‘Why file to get a refund instead of not paying in the money...’ held on the floor. However, the bill stands as is. Senators in favor of the EPIC plan showed strong commitment to these bills as they represent progress on tax relief. They took a portion of discussion time to push for bigger reforms to the system. Senator Halloran gave a strong speech in favor of EPIC tax. “One of the principles of taxation is you get more of what to incentivize and less of what you tax. What do you think you get when you give to those who don’t work and you tax income which is productivity? I will continue to support consumption tax which does not tax productivity”, Holleran stated. On a federal level, tax fallout continues in DC. As most of conservative America was tuned into the weaponization of the Justice System against Trump, the discussion continues to grow on Biden’s proposal to increase federal spending by approximately $500 billion (quickly approaching $7 TRILLION) and new taxes of $4.7 “T”rillion! The NEGOP encourages our federal delegation to honor Nancy Reagan’s legacy and “Just say No!”. There is no compromise to $4.7 trillion in new taxes. School Funding After property tax reform concluded, the Senators moved into debating Senator Sander’s bill (on behalf of the Governor) on school funding reform. School funding reform brings forth discussion on who has the most input on these bills and Republicans should encourage Senators to listen to the people. At the end of the day the bill passed 39-3. There were some amendments proposed and supported by Republicans that frustrated Republicans including the Governor. Diplomacy is a messy process in 2023. However, diplomacy surrounding our Conservative Values IS a necessary process to aid in “Big Wins” for the people. Historical wins on a variety of bills with no vote being able to go to waste is the situation we are in. Debate continues behind the scenes on school funding. Support for a variety of bills (some unrelated to these four bills) are needed to keep the coalition together for big wins outside of taxes. It is IMPORTANT to note that the conversation of “Respect the Package” has been prevalent this week. In summary, a historical bundled set of bills, often referred to as an Omnibus package in DC, was debated on income taxes, property taxes, school growth spending caps, and school funding. The package has been respected to date. The NEGOP has received numerous calls on ‘why was the amendment introduced?’ or ‘why discuss/support this new clause?’. The truth is that historical tax reform is not simple. There were opportunities to bring forth a sense of harmony to accomplish the bigger goal of tax relief, funding reform, and other critical issues outside of taxes. There are elements that may not match the NEGOP Legislative Plan, but we have seen necessary diplomacy to advance bigger goals and achieve Big Wins. Lincoln Elections Lincoln held their primary city elections this week. We need every Republican outside of the Star City to connect with their family/friends in Lincoln and demand they vote in the general election. One month is a quick turnaround between the primary and general! Mayor, City Council, Airport Boards, and School Boards are all on the line. Lincoln is still under the Emergency Authority of the Mayor from 3 years ago. (THREE years...Yes...that is reality). We need a functioning government that responds to the citizens and observes, not overrides, the City Charter or State Statutes. The turnout numbers were decent for Republicans. However, we are still in a neck-and-neck race. Republicans need an AMAZING turnout for the General election. Ballots will be mailed beginning April 17th. The NEGOP introduced a documentary series highlighting the erosion of Lincoln, titled "Lincoln in Decline". Full video viewings are being planned with church groups and grassroots organizations. If you have an interest in setting up a venue and viewing for a group, reach out to chairman@ne.gop. Chapter #1 already has 109k impressions and almost 21,000 views on Twitter alone. Subscribe to the NEGOP Twitter account to see the videos. Please share these productions on social media to educate Lincolnites and Nebraskans on the policies and choices of the Democrat mayor that have weakened the Capital City. Lincoln is the entry point...Nebraska is the target. Lincoln will look like San Francisco or Portland in under five years if we don't STAND now. Nebraska, like California, will not be far behind in crumbling. Unfortunately, the liberal media is manipulating the narrative in the Star City by suppressing information (Lincoln had a 50-bullet shootout in the Haymarket this past weekend that was buried by the press for days) FOR the benefit of the Mayor. Two vehicles and five different businesses were impacted by this violent criminal activity. The citizens need to speak directly to each other with a complicit media in weak coverage to change the trajectory of Lincoln. Senator Geist Resigns to Focus on Mayoral Race and Senator Bosn Steps Up With the Speaker announcing sessions will go long into the night and Senator Geist in a neck and neck race for Mayor, Suzanne decided to go “All In” for Lincoln. She resigned her position as Senator to solely focus on the Mayor race and be the conservative voice for the citizens of Lincoln, freeing them from infrastructure decline, crime, and unilateral rule. If you can help with the NEGOP statewide Day of Action in Lincoln on Saturday, April 29, please click here: With the vacancy in the Legislature, Governor Pillen appointed Senator Bosn, a native of Columbus who now lives in Lincoln, to represent LD 25. Senator Bosn was an attorney for Lancaster County six years ago and became a stay at home mom. She is an adjunct professor at the College of Law (UNL). We are looking forward to working with Senator Bosn in the legislature. Finally, we are grateful for a candidate like Stan Parker to be in our party and endorsing Suzanne after the election. Stan is a change agent for good with a bright future in Lincoln! $100+ Million Unaccounted for by DHHS Earlier this session, State Auditor Mike Foley revealed $15 million in accounting errors with the Department of Transportation. This week, he provided a bombshell report showing $135 MILLION of taxpayers dollars were accounted for improperly by the Department of Health and Human Services. The last SEVEN AUDITS show the same problems. The real question is where is the enforcement? We need a government that will follow the laws, but also a government that will enforce the laws on the book and not give passes to departments failing SEVEN AUDITS on the same issue. Taxpayer money needs to be recovered by the taxpayers. Decency and the ACTUAL rules on Cloture The NEGOP applauds Senator Armandariz and Senator Jacobsen for speaking out against the hateful rhetoric and inappropriate comments made by the filibustering Senators this week. Cussing on the mic, calling Senators names, etc. The response was warranted. Part of the problem with distasteful speech on the floor is that Senators are given so much time to speak on each bill and inevitably abuse that time with poor choices in words. The hours a bill must be heard is discretionary. The chamber is under the impression that 8 hours are needed for General File, 4 hours for Select File, and 2 hours for Final Reading However, that is not the rule they agreed to. Cloture (a rule to end debate on the bill) can be invoked without a specific set amount of time the debate. Sec. 10. Cloture. At any stage of consideration the principal introducer of the bill under consideration, a co-introducer with the consent of the principal introducer, or the chairperson of the committee, if the bill is introduced by that committee, may move for cloture to the presiding officer; however, the presiding officer may rule such motion for cloture out of order if, in presiding officer's opinion, a full and fair debate has not been afforded. Such ruling by the presiding officer shall not be subject to challenge. Whenever a motion for cloture is offered, the presiding officer shall immediately recognize such introducer or chairperson and shall then order debate on the pending amendment or motion to cease. A vote on the cloture motion shall be taken immediately. A two-thirds majority of the elected members shall be required for the cloture motion to be successful. A motion for cloture shall be in order except while a member is speaking, and a motion for cloture is not debatable. If the motion for cloture is successful, a vote on the pending matter shall be taken immediately, without debate. .... A motion for cloture shall have precedence over all other motions except a motion to recess or adjourn. A motion for cloture which fails for lack of sufficient votes shall result in the debate on the bill ending for the day. When the Speaker chooses to resume debate on the bill, successive motions for cloture shall not be in order until two additional hours of debate on the bill has occurred. If the presiding officer rejects a motion for cloture on a bill due to lack of full and fair debate, successive motions for cloture on the bill may be offered at any time. If we are discussing Senator Cavanaugh’s coffee mug collection, Senator Hunt needing a calculator to multiply numbers by 10, their feelings on ‘rights’ that are not germane to the bill on the floor, and whatever else they are talking about...it is clear a full and fair debate on the bill has been afforded. A cloture vote should occur and be granted. The vote on the final bill can then occur and the next bill can be heard. Cloture is CRITICAL for Republicans if more productive legislation is going to be passed this year. It is critical for Republicans to stand united on each cloture vote regardless if they agree with the bill or not so that more bills of critical importance can be heard and potentially passed this session by seeing the floor. The people's work needs to be done. Correction of Last Week’s Edition Last week I wrote the following: “The NEGOP Platform outlines that citizens should be charged fees to exercise their rights.” This was a typo. To be clear, the NEGOP believes that citizens should NOT be charged fees to exercise their rights. Until Next Week... Todd WatsonNEGOP Political Director political@ne.gop | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTYThis email was sent by: Nebraska Republican Party1610 N Street, Lincoln, NE, 68508 | | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please .

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654302%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WXlXK0RJs1Sws4d56s%2bHQQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654302%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WXlXK0RJs1Sws4d56s%2bHQQ&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654303%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L%2bBZhCLr6LNtaJgnpj7k2A&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654304%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ug3%2f4BKqvtlFFU%2f%2fN0q1Wg&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654318%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7uJn7QOH%2f%2fLNvJQgxlFlCQ&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654314%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2rrbjJ42tk1MTA%2fgfwEyWw&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c654325%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jnyeyNRxgkhiel0KZrxtGw&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: Allen West
subject: Will you just stand there.... or will you fight?
body:
Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject?

| |
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zin1qdj8nim0oddqudmlo91ptl2pv6s84ff8fe00_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
---
| | Are you a Citizen? Or a Subject? It's time to decide. Because there is a well-funded, well-organized and growing movement to take away the single most important Constitutional Freedom that keeps us free ... The Constitutional Right keeps the wolves at your door and the tyrants in our government at bay ... It's your Right to KEEP AND BEAR ARMS -- and it's the one you're in imminent danger of losing if we, the people, don't stand up to protect it. [**Will you take a stand for your Second Amendment Rights today?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi33rr67vqv6bogv64gbk7ddhpnep3cr86n5g2r0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs) My friend, there's reason I was issued a rifle when I joined the Army ... It's because when all else fails, a firearm is ultimately what determines who's in charge. I know it... You know it ... **That's why Joe Biden and his friends on the Radical Left want you dis-armed.** They'd much rather RULE over SUBJECTS than ANSWER to CITIZENS! There are a lot of groups out there "pledging" to protect your Second Amendment Rights. You've probably got a drawer full of their folding knives ... A few of their duffle bags ... Maybe even a vest or a membership card in your wallet. BUT HERE'S THE THING ... After 50 years of sending out membership renewal notices, pocketknives, and plastic cards, why are your 2nd Amendment Rights in more danger of being taken away from you than they have ever been? But that's where you'll find the Second Amendment Institute. The Second Amendment Institute is a brand-new kind of Amendment advocacy group. A group more concerned with action than image ... [**Will you join the growing membership of the Second Amendment Institute through a donation of $35 today?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2632ph5s92ngbji3k4er8f7l0i8umueqcsqj210_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs) Your much-needed support will help us run into the fight with a multi-pronged attack -- just like our enemies have launched against us:
---
* Legal Battles to protect your 2nd Amendment Rights ... * Our one-of-a-kind Outreach to young people on college campuses * Our Partnership with pro-2nd Amendment Legislators * Our National Conferences and Online Community
---
You don't have to come to one of our conferences, testify in a courtroom or march in the street to get involved with what we're doing here at SAI. That's why our membership and online community has now surpassed the 4.2 MILLION mark!! But one name is missing from that list of over 4.2 million -YOURS!! [**Can you spare $35 to join the Second Amendment Institute and save your Second Amendment Right to bear arms today?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvajpogfk8hqe03kacucn10k69927r577rqlcb88_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs) If you can't, maybe you contribute $20. Maybe you can make up for someone who can't afford a $35 or even $20 gift today by blessing them and us with a major gift of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more. If this seems like a strange way to ask for your support today, you're right -- I told you that SAI is different! But different is good -- it's going to get the job done -- it's going to save your Right to Keep and Bear Arms. Now let's get to work together. God bless you and God Bless America,
---
---
Lieutenant Colonel Allen B. West (US Army, Ret) Member, 112th US Congress
---
P.S. Here's something else that's different about The Second Amendment Institute -- you get to choose your membership cost. That's right -- you read that correctly. Tyler Yzaguirre, the President of SAI, has shared with me that if [**everyone I write to today could spare a gift of $35, that should just about cover what they have planned in the months ahead, and even allow them to grow their outreach efforts**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zaumng5vuak4bimhd364svfsjt4s30439tmqcjg0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6t6ojl86ol12qon8m2ol6be7ckijch6ilkhlmng_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
---
| |
---
|
---

Pro Life Update
---

name: Mike Lee
subject: Here’s how we can wipe out socialism in our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl7u8rvkgcqq2d4ncfk412327165timkdp7rlog8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
Friend,

Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide, and our children are being influenced to adopt radical beliefs that could destroy our culture and our Republic.

Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that could help turn the tide, educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism, and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfp1fdesse6si2ihtl68ger9dvf0b7uan0s3rf5o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
Connor helped me get elected back in 2010. Since then, he founded the Libertas Institute, a free market think tank headquartered in our home state, Utah. Connor was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins series when he was unable to find a way to teach his own kids about the ideas of freedom.

So far, Connor has distributed over 4 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. **Connor is leading the fight against socialist indoctrination in our schools, creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. **

[**Here is how Connor and the Libertas Institute plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb8aqriin5bot9p56ob1rh5akesgeo0e8jc5mh00_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history will receive copies for education at home.
2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.
3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [**It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuvk9dqv6vbsq0sttnfchipnfm2dlfkdimkbet5g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)

**The reality is neither Rand Paul, Ted Cruz, nor myself can defeat socialism alone ... we need a new generation of young conservatives willing to stand up for the Constitution and our freedoms.**

You and I can help save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with the Tuttle Twins books!

**I spoke with Connor Boyack, the President of the Libertas Institute and author of the books, and gave him my word I would help him raise $20,000 to fund the distribution of the Tuttle Twins books to homeschool children, parents, and kids in public schools.** [**Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu3f3t596jrloj345ba64ure2h4isj5lne1vth18_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)

***PLEASE NOTE: All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute 's biggest supporters, John P. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift.***

[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs1drvp1bachrjr9dsrvfrajt7eg2emlat586c6g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
[**Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4v20kae2kft84ksea51skc1h2vpigg33knmtll8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
[**Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3l5fr0449nsug94nefaj3v2jq4f7re5je7h7cr8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
[**Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgqnkvp12hbdurgi3ku2qk7f8rir8bttn5257in0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
[**Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgpde5oo2r5olbfbu2vm13t3l0nf30pu038l60fg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
[**Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjaubl1cqa4tfvlectcrltc9m0kdr9io0bv1lmvo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
[**Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3qmakbl2eeb16rfp57u272tlmcai2ig62lfbgc0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsps5j1s3jb2vln39mrb2b22lokttf9dthn925m8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)

The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them.

Parents aren't forcing their kids to read them. They are written for children to enjoy and learn at the same time.

**This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. You and I can create a new generation of young conservatives to preserve our Republic. **

As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine, and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and one of our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools.

[**Please help me raise $20,000 in the next 48 hours by clicking here to make a donation and distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to thousands of kids across the country!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z58s7bgblvk1sc2iau7mpodr78tdema9o138fou8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)

I suspect you get a dozen emails asking you to donate every week.

This is much different.

This isn't for some campaign or candidate that needs money.

This is a cause I am passionate about and believe can reverse the influence of socialism in our society. We just need to distribute these books and begin teaching our nation's youth about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history.

It seems like you love our country, the ideas of liberty, and the Constitution as much as I do.

Which is why I am emailing you.

Please consider making the most generous donation you can and help me restore our Republic.

Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me.

[**Here is the link to donate again.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z94lhpi5q6rdjg3b9jejbcu398cam57q1gtge8h0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)

Senator Mike Lee

Paid for by Libertas Institute

Deroy Murdock

name: ICYMI News
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z04dffibv1e5i90p1p5tpts40cldm257a12uhtio_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk6f9kvresurj1oi4979hie3gpceft7uam21ccvg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5cjh2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7jeposabf2t8mckl0e8ft39ou4o168kdgquu1co_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5cjh2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: “136 YEARS IN PRISON, maximum sentence”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
Our country is dying, but we will save it!

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpklcphlndbr050v9ogtis28tvg097hh9sg7rsbg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob1cdh2bs)
---
Friend,
I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I loved – to hear that I could face **136 YEARS IN PRISON** for having committed **NO CRIME**.
But I did not sit there feeling sorry for myself.
I felt sorry for our country – because this is _NOT_ America.
Let me assure you – I have NEVER been more determined than I am right now to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_**These attacks confirm how much hangs in the balance in the 2024 election.**_
Winning in 2024 is about more than just an election. It’s about the survival of our Free Republic.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Infant Formula Shortages Force Parents To Feed Babies… What?
body:
Infant formula shortages left 70% of US stores without formula in

subject: We need you to STAY on our team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdd0egju4ri5bkuo6nqknoto7is5nkkq29r604h0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j66oj5clh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4rc29836kuojv301n7u6rptha15sc9jo5dqtn78_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j66oj5clh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr7uu74nfqgmnh0sg9l2ujulq64ht8o1edqqlql8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j66oj5clh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3pmajpa44cm4a8jds1p3ji7a0sfv0k50uqcvmlo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j66oj5clh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zthm6nsrau66p1d1pi7lsfkdirmpkkl28kju2r50_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j66oj5clh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpihdhv8tf4fgrs1r1cc4rt74bv40upcmb6mc0cg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j66oj5clh2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4tli0na6v17s97rbuoj3pevqhttlodl2f5dkleo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j66oj5clh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrj20g15sl80m07mghofce6kk4k6krl82j4uh688_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j66oj5clh2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj9uj27itsda5seb1ojt88lte6084vs9bjfpcdm8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j66oj5clh2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4ufcdnl2036dhdqdoaa13toc5i7r76aneq7db90_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j66oj5clh2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zghb6u5eh1kachos95prmjii1esmt2o4ebp0rc4g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1veu0kkh9r53b0pjmtc74361tpk8si5pa8vji4g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4vc3a6gv0es8h92sl2ers8q07hgp9p2h50fp9j0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j62ob5c9h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Banking Nightmare
body:
During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, During and after the Great Financial Crisis of 2008, 485 U.S. banks went under. We warned about 484 -- an accuracy rate of 99.8% Now, I have a new warning. But this time, it’s not just about a few hundred banks. It’s about nearly every single bank in America, whether large or small. A veritable banking nightmare! [See what it is here](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15785%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nXOetDCaVk%2br5xcdYhTJLw&sysid=1). Good luck and God bless! |

Friend, On this Easter Sunday, Governor Holcomb and Janet wanted to take a moment to wish you and your families a very happy and blessed Easter.

| [ ](https://click.act.holcombforindiana.com/?qs=56b92119b445176b5731c661426a4d640aa6014e15b0c01c17dcfbf4d2a64e9442e75c42b5c30b3e5d60f3b521bd15fcd95f5a1d504eb429)

This is a time of renewal and hope, a time to reflect on the sacrifices of those who came before us and to look forward to the future with optimism and faith. May this Easter bring you joy, peace, and a renewed sense of hope for the future. And may we all continue to work together to build a brighter, more prosperous one Indiana for All. **Happy Easter to you and your loved ones.** Thank you, Holcomb HQ

name: Mrs. Trump
subject: They are targeting me, and I need your help to fight back.
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.-2MiaSKTrzw)
---
Fellow American, Trinity University in Texas labeled me "an elevated risk" and forced me to pay "special liability insurance" because my last name is Trump. [**Will you stand me with now and demand the university reverse this?**](http://trk.readactnews.-4IbisWw) That's right... before I could step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, was forced to pay for special liability insurance. The Young Conservatives of Texas, who sponsored my speech, told me they have _NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before._ [**Will you join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they should overturn this outrageous decision? Add your name to our open letter right now.**](http://trk.readactnews.-KUb0FA5xL_nYMXQ)****
---
[ Stand with Speech First](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Fellow American, even if I were related to President Trump (I'm not related), Trinity University would still be making a gross misstep and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the "Woke" student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone whom far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let "Woke" student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation - and our educational system - ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! **After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?** I don't think so! [**Fellow American, add your name to Speech First's open letter right now to tell Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision ... and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.**](http://trk.readactnews._b33rneBZP3ArqwoA) They want you to think that the issue is over, but their decision sets a dangerous precedent of discrimination on campus. I urgently need you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the Leftist administrators at Trinity University. Thank you for your support!
---
Cherise TrumpExecutive DirectorSpeech First
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[Stand with Speech First](http://trk.readactnews._EIf3w9RHilQ)
---
1300 I St NW Suite 400EWashington, DC 20005
---

It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak. There's good news though, friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to "11:59 PM TONIGHT." "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?" | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" | "ORDER NOW" We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side. You only have until "11:59 PM" to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. "Renew before it’s too late" Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down. name: 1600 Daily
subject: Take the National Survey on Socialism
body:
Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0rdchj2tb857fcdmmtmq2d45bdei5s3bso0ov60_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z63jpuknkg8tq6niu7svtihe48unhre2quqn7t30_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36c9h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi916t7iaf4d2endgg4tkmt1corvv29h7rh7ahm0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36c9h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z29osbmi2sau3khbmofo0oelm34565tk8h8bjdio_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8o30shh60pb246h22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq3q63kspb5mivktn611bocdg0navivjqngei5i8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoeevfkv4f92devpcdknkp45oc61b7kfmbncdeno_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0shg6co70cph649fg)

subject: Renew your 2023 Membership today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z06gei2s67cioalre3msg76l6v1pp6so7vfqa7fo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j69o74cph2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm3b068n5dgifv4320r1b8l7e971dsoat1jft8qg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j69o74cph2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrdf9o82dgk87prve987rguj2i2vsa0cahjafl00_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j69o74cph2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zelsprcfa76b97p71qbr3cfkfpghlsc9ue1p6lg8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j69o74cph2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zme0e6gn4iingqpk84mfup2vd1ldbf18es85f810_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j69o74cph2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn8agnl49788c95lif0oj5u83n91glbgpmsup7bg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j69o74cph2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoj0r4usglk578cegesdtdgtr5puihki1c4j9qdg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j69o74cph2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8lrp8vih6s5be2jp3n0soi9kr1mj16le22h2ug0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j69o74cph2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmkab2d0v2ct5rqmq1l6n41bmt349igcbb7dpgm0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36cph2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm5k1nt89pch3rfvq98eec0bbnoerlvgtj7vrnc0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36cph2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2lvtfe95mvipke21t1ec8lth1pb70qu5d9adr80_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36cph2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5fukvfj69jsl9iqghebpnnjuf2s9crrd8nuplkg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36cph2bs)

[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zon0oi522djgm5qj1ge1eb12igu714qhijah15q0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36cph2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgfa0d3i7qn3e9409hk66absi6ectorcj619p2e0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36cph2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6mvll3o0nus8ki46p6oikp0i3jl83eoivdm5o88_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1j61o36cph2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: David Horowitz
subject: 2024 is the final battle
body:
I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information

| |
---
| |
---
| | I’m writing you this email today because I’ve learned critical information about the far-left’s plan to turn America into a socialist nation that will rock you to your core. My latest book **“[ Final Battle: The Next Election Could Be the Last](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15781%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RTvjr7gTvyrFvxKYOD9kYg&sysid=1)”[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15782%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lqtlXxG2Feh1D4WLqs6RoA&sysid=1)** lays out how the left plans to influence our elections to destroy the very freedoms America was founded on. And this crucial information needs to be in the hands of every American patriot. But don’t take my word for it - take the word of Donald Trump and other patriots concerned for America’s future.
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15783%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w%2fZWhb%2fibQx2CfaxOZ4muA&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| "David Horowitz exposes the outrages perpetrated by the Biden administration and the Democratic left."
---
**\-- Dinesh D’Souza** **New York Times Bestselling Author and Filmmaker**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _"Final Battle_ may be the most devastating book-length indictment of the Democratic Party yet written. This is nothing less than a handbook for the salvation of the United States of America.”
---
**\-- Dennis Prager** **Nationally Syndicated Radio Talk Show Host**
---
| | |
---
| | **With your donation of $35 or more today, I will mail you a copy of my must-read new book _Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last_.** Thousands of patriotic Americans who felt disenfranchised after the 2020 elections are reading my book, **“[ Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15784%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3mj%2bW0oNS0BwzrIw1ADxpg&sysid=1)”** They’re learning about the damage the radical left has done to the integrity of our elections and what you and I need to do to fight back and restore America.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15795%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EDes%2ffTccVodl75ktTIaWg&sysid=1)
---
| | You see, 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary determined to bring America as we know it to its end...
---
**_I was one of them ... before I saw the truth..._**
---
| | That’s how I know the radical Left inside and out-- because I was deeply involved. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - the largest magazine for radical Marxists. But after the Black Panthers murdered my friend and aided the Communists in Vietnam, I finally opened my eyes to their lies. I cast my vote for Ronald Reagan, and never looked back. And ever since, I’ve dedicated my life to exposing and destroying their radical plans for our country. That’s exactly what I write about in my latest book **[Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15784%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3mj%2bW0oNS0BwzrIw1ADxpg&sysid=1)** **That’s why I’m asking you to join me and thousands of other Americans in this fight, through a donation of $35 or more today. With your $35 donation I’ll send you a complimentary copy of Final Battle so you can read the truth the Left is fighting so hard to keep out of your hands.** The Left thrives when no one knows what they’re doing, why they’re doing it, or who’s helping them do it. That is why I’ve dedicated my life to exposing the methods and motives of the radical left to American patriots like you.
---
| | In Freedom,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. As Trump said in his speech in Waco, TX: “2024 is the final battle, it’s going to be the big one.” We must arm as many Americans as we can with the truth about 2020 and the leftist plans for America. **Will you donate $35 today so I can mail you your copy right away?**
---
[Send me my copy of
**__Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last__**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15796%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L4kQaBaAcxc5QmLH%2b5Mrcw&sysid=1)

name: Mike Lee
subject: Here’s how we can wipe out socialism in our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zus181dpncrt85bo3soire83sgocclg9rifat78o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)
Friend,

Socialism is infiltrating our school system nationwide, and our children are being influenced to adopt radical beliefs that could destroy our culture and our Republic.

Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that could help turn the tide, educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism, and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, the Constitution, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0pa1dsckvi8sqf2lqbcskil000b79va73n3hc00_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)
Connor helped me get elected back in 2010. Since then, he founded the Libertas Institute, a free market think tank headquartered in our home state, Utah. Connor was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins series when he was unable to find a way to teach his own kids about the ideas of freedom.

So far, Connor has distributed over 4 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. **Connor is leading the fight against socialist indoctrination in our schools, creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country. **

[**Here is how Connor and the Libertas Institute plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7uuppaganu1d54fek020ei4j6or1duqsgrrlagg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)
1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history will receive copies for education at home.
2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.
3. In order to do this, we must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [**It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z62roi0i284ke0viv2fdbjvfm6igql6i8euhnahg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)

**The reality is neither Rand Paul, Ted Cruz, nor myself can defeat socialism alone ... we need a new generation of young conservatives willing to stand up for the Constitution and our freedoms.**

You and I can help save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with the Tuttle Twins books!

**I spoke with Connor Boyack, the President of the Libertas Institute and author of the books, and gave him my word I would help him raise $20,000 to fund the distribution of the Tuttle Twins books to homeschool children, parents, and kids in public schools.** [**Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze8t03sviq1msv58817mm2ummdoabm79ga5e4lbg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)

***PLEASE NOTE: All online donations are being matched by one of the Libertas Institute 's biggest supporters, John P. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift.***

[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 >>>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z33fv10el12j2hmj0s1u4h8vedjj9aapfn2t3lu0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)
[**Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 >>>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3gi0g7isve32kpe3l3p9l8gerosbgs1as9bhrm8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)
[**Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 >>>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znnu3quojd4uh79fihq856219eomtd2jk57er8gg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)
[**Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 >>>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2eg03tauso0i5f2rp4vdduqbcneonv6sihmbkgo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)
[**Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 >>>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8it87jiurnacrdv88q8jq14spdvhgf9ffgbn0i8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)
[**Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 >>>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zucrj54vcmej663qllt95u4bem6p5jajk4rii3v0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)
[**Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 >>>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm7b25c6a1baqulrjem8id6ap7hoe7aos7o8h3jg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk2i5hpchakg27kt96ld8d5d1f7diu2pfpno8ec0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)

The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them.

Parents aren't forcing their kids to read them. They are written for children to enjoy and learn at the same time.

**This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. You and I can create a new generation of young conservatives to preserve our Republic. **

As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine, and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and one of our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools.

[**Please help me raise $20,000 in the next 48 hours by clicking here to make a donation and distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to thousands of kids across the country!**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zejpiilh45r3v559m9p9ei75fksh6ik9ak80iu28_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)

I suspect you get a dozen emails asking you to donate every week.

This is much different.

This isn't for some campaign or candidate that needs money.

This is a cause I am passionate about and believe can reverse the influence of socialism in our society. We just need to distribute these books and begin teaching our nation's youth about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history.

It seems like you love our country, the ideas of liberty, and the Constitution as much as I do.

Which is why I am emailing you.

Please consider making the most generous donation you can and help me restore our Republic.

Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me.

[**Here is the link to donate again.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm28h0hfaj248boe9ljm3sd3cjqtamum5kpq62so_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or6chh2bs)

Senator Mike Lee

Paid for by Libertas Institute

American Defense News

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Bank Accounts: Frozen!
body:
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. In 2022, it hit closer to home -- in Canada. The government used its 1988 Emergency Act to freeze the bank accounts of hundreds of striking truckers. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. |
---
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.
See front page is right here _a_
It gives the Fed the power to track and potentially even control your checking account.
Not just the money you have in your account at the moment ...
But also, every single check, withdrawal, deposit~~,~~ and transaction.
Practically everything you do with your money!
[You can find out the eerie details by clicking here.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbo7cvsr3sila0dsiv7qcjkpbgjkuqdoai0ls8pg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or1c1h2bs)
Be sure to do so with urgency.
A pilot program is already underway.
The next step is to roll it out to nearly every bank in America.
[Click here to learn how to protect your money](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3pkj5b88rch33gmln3ee889diacbb1vipuqq0dg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or1c1h2bs).
Good luck and God bless!
---
Martin D. Weiss, PhD
Weiss Ratings Founder
P.S. This is not about a digital currency. It's very different. [Find out exactly what it is here.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpa2gq1u2l98h6lc87saphjs8if34duqg4mue6gg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c1gm8or1c1h2bs)
