name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Democrats' "Affordable Housing" Bill
body:
Happy Easter! We hope you are spending time with your friends and family this holiday weekend for so many people of faith. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61680652:W53HLDDON:m:1:2610672541:6361A6F56D2447461CFBE36AA2A748F1:r "Shift
Washington")
---
| Friends,

Happy Easter! We hope you are spending time with your friends and family this holiday weekend for so many people of faith. And as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on...

**This week 's OP-ED...**
Greg Lane, the Executive Vice President of the Building Industry Association of Washington, wrote an insightful piece evaluating House Bill 1628 - a proposal to raise the real estate excise tax (REET). As Lane explains, the bill would "raise our state tax from a tie for the highest in the nation into the dubious position of having far and away the costliest REET in the land." And it's all in the name of affordable housing. But will the bill actually make our housing crisis worse? [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61680653:W53HLDDON:m:1:2610672541:6361A6F56D2447461CFBE36AA2A748F1:r)**.**

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
Third-term Republican Representative Jenny Graham (LD-6, Western Spokane County) joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. Graham discussed her role in holding a rally at the Capitol Building last month, as the legislature debated fixing many of the Democrats' failed 2021 anti-police laws. Among other topics, Graham also discussed her frustration with Democrats' failure to make a rather simple fix to Washington's drug laws which would encourage addicts get the help they desperately need. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61680654:W53HLDDON:m:1:2610672541:6361A6F56D2447461CFBE36AA2A748F1:r).

**This week 's can't miss story...**
The Department of Ecology "basically screwed it up" - to use the words of Democrat Senator Mark Mullet - in the state's implementation of the costly cap-and-trade tax program. But the Democrats' new bill intended to fix the mistakes which are hurting farmers sneakily includes a clause that - simply put - allows Ecology and the state to hide the staggering consumer costs of the scheme. The legislation attempts to "forbid fuel suppliers or distributors from listing cap-and-trade surcharges on invoices." In other words, a gag order on how much the program is costing Washington consumers. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61680655:W53HLDDON:m:1:2610672541:6361A6F56D2447461CFBE36AA2A748F1:r)**.**

**In case you missed it ...**
It took Democrat State Senators almost 10 full days to use the State Supreme Court's bizarre decision to allow an unconstitutional state income tax - just as long as it's called an "excise tax" - to create a new tax approach. Democrat Senators Christine Rolfes and Emily Randall recently introduced Senate Bill 5767, a new 7.5% "excise tax" on the "excess compensation" of hospital administrators. Apparently, Democrats are now targeting groups of people they do not like with "excise taxes"... a.k.a. income taxes. Isn't that special. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61680656:W53HLDDON:m:1:2610672541:6361A6F56D2447461CFBE36AA2A748F1:r)**.**

P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by [**clicking here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61680657:W53HLDDON:m:1:2610672541:6361A6F56D2447461CFBE36AA2A748F1:r).

P.S.S. To get early insight into what might make Shift's next Daily Briefing worth reading, tune in to 570 KVI on your AM dial weekday mornings at 8:05, to hear John Carlson talk Washington State legislative politics with Shift co-founder Randy Pepple. And you can always stay for the rest of the Commute with Carlson by tuning in [**here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61680658:W53HLDDON:m:1:2610672541:6361A6F56D2447461CFBE36AA2A748F1:r). | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61680659:W53HLDDON:m:1:2610672541:6361A6F56D2447461CFBE36AA2A748F1:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14175830&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oW53HLDDON).

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: We have a BIG fracking problem
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1713249?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | _**It starts with a faint odor.**_ Soon, it grows stronger and stronger. The stench of rotten eggs slithers into your home. Not long after, it becomes nauseating, causing _**SPLITTING HEADACHES!**_ You go to the kitchen to get a cup of water, expecting your drinking water to be safe. But it smells too, and if you bring over a lighter, you might find that you can **LIGHT YOUR OWN TAP WATER ON FIRE!** **_This is what living near FRACKING can do to your life._** Unleashed gases snake into neighborhoods and into drinking water, damaging public health and risking fiery accidents. The people facing these challenges don’t choose to live in danger -- corporate polluters often site their dirty projects in communities they don’t think can fight back. **But they’re wrong -- and there’s a way you can help!** The Department of Interior is poised to lease our public lands to corporate polluters that want to **FRACK, MINE, and DRILL AWAY,** destroying critical wildlife habitats and putting local communities at risk. These companies have made one thing clear: they prioritize profits over people and the planet. **We’re RUNNING OUT OF TIME to tell the Department of Interior to REJECT the lease sale.** **[Friend, protect people and public lands from GREEDY POLLUTERS. Tell the DOI to STOP the lease sale by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1713250?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1713251?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
It’s not just annoying odors and flammable gases. Fracking wastewater can even contain _**RADIOACTIVE WASTE!**_ And this wastewater can contaminate the drinking water for local communities. If the DOI allows this lease to move forward, it will be actively endangering communities!
Would you want to see fracking in your city, Friend? I know I wouldn’t. That’s why we have to stop the Department of Interior for giving the greenlight to corporate polluters to frack on public lands and near other communities. **[Please take just 30 seconds to SEND A MESSAGE TO THE DOI: Keep GREEDY CORPORATIONS off our public lands!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1713252?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1713251?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil Fuels Program Manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
| | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62536953:JADFESGLN:m:1:3365131770:182E4DEB5C7538DAD6BB5F57E9B176B1:r)
---
Peter,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62536953:JADFESGLN:m:1:3365131770:182E4DEB5C7538DAD6BB5F57E9B176B1:r)**

---
Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62536953:JADFESGLN:m:1:3365131770:182E4DEB5C7538DAD6BB5F57E9B176B1:r)

Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

Peter, I want to take a moment to wish you and your family a happy and blessed Easter.

I am so grateful to live in a country where we all have the freedom to worship on this beautiful day.

Enjoy the lovely springtime weather with your families, and take a moment to give thanks that you’re lucky enough to live in the freest nation on Earth.

In Liberty,

CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db49f116b5b48b198f79d38f1e8d020&_e=whkqwPw6FPpBLp-2FWhRA7yhLWo0JueGcs1mmCHPeFo9GUX8YNjbBIna6wo-IpSI9bdWhdbNcVllyNlMNjRHFzMlMmLpDjOR33CLzprEwwAuvXIYvlVtb0Za5ypd8O6O8-tYeu3XPJtENaeWuX27VgYghPK-bcxNdZ_cETFHS9Sr54HzHliaNOsZB72C2v-uOpR-STNXy9WhO5izSPbV8t_fZKwgFwicXvF7XcpeVUbBzFDPC8O-ITjFvzDbtpdfyg2Enf2xMaLrYFKA_3ELpg3lRgZACMEkeAwHb_1ToYWELCMKFnc9-EtswsZITRE7bnCdV45XoWJP8KbFkOIID4WyUfV1mWwjyqfWPBfiC2I9d6iRGTGgTQqJ6iaSHponi-oS82BO2eHXdNr0TBjo2bw1dYmn69kOa7YZMY4C3w0StRZF4OfwaIqiSj_qvqJy "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db49f116b5b48b198f79d38f1e8d020&_e=whkqwPw6FPpBLp-2FWhRA7yhLWo0JueGcs1mmCHPeFo9GUX8YNjbBIna6wo-IpSI9bdWhdbNcVllyNlMNjRHFzMlMmLpDjOR33CLzprEwwAuvXIYvlVtb0Za5ypd8O6O8-tYeu3XPJtENaeWuX27VgYghPK-bcxNdZ_cETFHS9Sr54HzHliaNOsZB72C2v-uOpR-STNXy9WhO5izSPbV8t_fZKwgFwicXvF7XcpeVUbBzFDPC8O-ITjFvzDbtpdfyg2Enf2xMaLrYFKA_3ELpg3lRgZACMEkeAwHb_1ToYUVnNzyqdn5evnIz-6J51UA47ocUw8iR220OC9VUk-tgcPzsj2M30sTxoZcQgr4gdpMpfggT_BLWg7Bsp7tBbR5W9OU6TnZkzoXWu5KbFODmQnpTAdAlu_NCdSQXvVMp2K77d4tuceNJe5VozK8-GIP "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db49f116b5b48b198f79d38f1e8d020&_e=whkqwPw6FPpBLp-2FWhRA7yhLWo0JueGcs1mmCHPeFo9GUX8YNjbBIna6wo-IpSI9bdWhdbNcVllyNlMNjRHFzMlMmLpDjOR33CLzprEwwAuvXIYvlVtb0Za5ypd8O6O8-tYeu3XPJtENaeWuX27VgYghPK-bcxNdZ_cETFHS9Sr54HzHliaNOsZB72C2v-uOpR-STNXy9WhO5izSPbV8t_fZKwgFwicXvF7XcpeVUbBzFDPC8O-ITjFvzDbtpdfyg2Enf2xMaLrYFKA_3ELpg3lRgZACMEkeAwHb_1ToYXdt_zkRdeVehNaw3DRSopDm_xhjDkHR15n5-C8cVVVvoWvdY35-O4pmkeqMHKJqYp9Y2H2fyvTyNm2_j5peh6q5AE6sZaECuqXSE4Rwe-rcjeB9v4m__FNg2U8AxQQ8eVywzTWHL989aP1bGeGEzXL "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db49f116b5b48b198f79d38f1e8d020&_e=whkqwPw6FPpBLp-2FWhRA7yhLWo0JueGcs1mmCHPeFo9GUX8YNjbBIna6wo-IpSI9bdWhdbNcVllyNlMNjRHFzMlMmLpDjOR33CLzprEwwAuvXIYvlVtb0Za5ypd8O6O8-tYeu3XPJtENaeWuX27VgYghPK-bcxNdZ_cETFHS9Sr54HzHliaNOsZB72C2v-uOpR-STNXy9WhO5izSPbV8t_fZKwgFwicXvF7XcpeVUbBzFDPC8O-ITjFvzDbtpdfyg2Enf2xMaLrYFKA_3ELpg3lRgZACMEkeAwHb_1ToYUoEiKUStu4wjO2y5ZHr8B-xszr5jAqQnbp9RgPmP_BnEaAhDKd5JD1Y8IO90qtmaXfVEbw0LsLTpx6mGjdwVMKvsoBJj3OvuuZFplruYOw1T2ZGjMy6lZLvnnllPv6aEG7gU_8cjC4O6T8vdAvuZLh "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db49f116b5b48b198f79d38f1e8d020&_e=whkqwPw6FPpBLp-2FWhRA7yhLWo0JueGcs1mmCHPeFo9GUX8YNjbBIna6wo-IpSI9bdWhdbNcVllyNlMNjRHFzMlMmLpDjOR33CLzprEwwAuvXIYvlVtb0Za5ypd8O6O8-tYeu3XPJtENaeWuX27VgYghPK-bcxNdZ_cETFHS9Sr54HzHliaNOsZB72C2v-uOpR-STNXy9WhO5izSPbV8t_fZKwgFwicXvF7XcpeVUbBzFDPC8O-ITjFvzDbtpdfyg2Enf2xMaLrYFKA_3ELpg3lRgZACMEkeAwHb_1ToYW7U6Vb_K5URjq99pjFVplsLyLKpzaQFXvJdLzH8Re38sEHVAxYmSITfn0mohGlMf2BNdzUorSE0gjC1SCM_Sm2h05N7N5YUh6lKfoPpE4IL3ifFG8ZpRVWOqSDhkY87SvOVJz8-y9AzuSddUZbJKWK "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db49f116b5b48b198f79d38f1e8d020&_e=whkqwPw6FPpBLp-2FWhRA7yhLWo0JueGcs1mmCHPeFo9GUX8YNjbBIna6wo-IpSI9bdWhdbNcVllyNlMNjRHFzMlMmLpDjOR33CLzprEwwAuvXIYvlVtb0Za5ypd8O6O8-tYeu3XPJtENaeWuX27VgYghPK-bcxNdZ_cETFHS9Sr54HzHliaNOsZB72C2v-uOpR-STNXy9WhO5izSPbV8t_fZKwgFwicXvF7XcpeVUbBzFDPC8O-ITjFvzDbtpdfyg2Enf2xMaLrYFKA_3ELpg3lRgZACMEkeAwHb_1ToYXv-RAhLcYFIISBEsS46BNd4bLNo-x_TRukspWZaCwauowBSWghI7TSEIHUs34xpJmpxd0UYDbyQAlbsJaLmzejsvfEkBsMPtqidTf9-rzQjlUxhrYy1niGSkBRnbCkbLk3E1lzm5RbcLftX9xpuwnb "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db49f116b5b48b198f79d38f1e8d020&_e=whkqwPw6FPpBLp-2FWhRA7yhLWo0JueGcs1mmCHPeFo9GUX8YNjbBIna6wo-IpSI9bdWhdbNcVllyNlMNjRHFzMlMmLpDjOR33CLzprEwwAuvXIYvlVtb0Za5ypd8O6O8-tYeu3XPJtENaeWuX27VgYghPK-bcxNdZ_cETFHS9Sr54HzHliaNOsZB72C2v-uOpR-STNXy9WhO5izSPbV8t_fZKwgFwicXvF7XcpeVUbBzFDPC8O-ITjFvzDbtpdfyg2Enf2xMaLrYFKA_3ELpg3lRgZACMEkeAwHb_1ToYXV12v6X3tcEX3Lr3zbwpVo9iPUT-qU12Oh1mJ1AZPxkEg1QK5bvNnXlfSHgMjtzhlNoR0hc9LpS1H2rt3EIssXALd5hZgdq-JEt1lGb1YVqjs_561IFmMlbnBSPyyfe6LCDwuSHBV9g8G4tU_CI-3E "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1db49f116b5b48b198f79d38f1e8d020&_e=whkqwPw6FPpBLp-2FWhRA7yhLWo0JueGcs1mmCHPeFo9GUX8YNjbBIna6wo-IpSI9bdWhdbNcVllyNlMNjRHFzMlMmLpDjOR33CLzprEwwAuvXIYvlVtb0Za5ypd8O6O8-tYeu3XPJtENaeWuX27VgYghPK-bcxNdZ_cETFHS9Sr54HzHliaNOsZB72C2v-uOpR-STNXy9WhO5izSPbV8t_fZKwgFwicXvF7XcpeVUbBzFDPC8O-ITjFvzDbtpdfyg2Enf2xMaLrYFKA_3ELpg3lRgZACMEkeAwHb_1ToYWb0rnBBkOc-9xUgzrALeMXfeO5KQeCLtdJ2VwDrJ6JjZN-45t_nlAMDnO3g3tANszd4UJX7IPFIhhBXiKEuf6TAcM5yqMHY_Vy8YEMa6Y_Jz-D9FtozSvDbl0s0Amd3mYmcr-z1AbzMJ_Xa7IX9l-P "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: In Tennessee, two Black state legislators need your help to win their special elections, after they were expelled from the legislature by Republicans for joining a peaceful protest.
body:
Urgent Tennessee special elections
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T77ab0b5b-24c8-4e91-bedd-31aed85b129d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Since we watched yet another slaughter of our children, in Tennessee, the masks, or should I say hoods, have come off Republican state legislators._** Over the past few days, students marched to the statehouse to protest the fact that after the latest mass shooting in Nashville, Republicans planned to do nothing. _Though nothing might have been better than what they did do, which was to put forward a bill to arm teachers and also ..._ **_Three Democratic state legislators: Reps Justin Jones, Justin Pearson and Gloria Johnson_** **_joined the students in protesting. _**_For that they were threatened with expulsion by the Republican majority in an unprecedented move by the MAGA Republicans. The Democrats had broken no laws, they had just peacefully protested._ _Yet, in this state where the Ku Klux Klan was founded, where 50 years ago to the week Martin Luther King Jr., gave the final speech of his life, _**_Pearson and Jones--both Black--were expelled. Johnson, who's white, was not. When asked by the media why she was spared, and not her colleagues, an angry Johnson said it "might have to do with the color of our skin."_** **_Jones, in his final speech, pointed out Republicans didn't expel their own members for child molestation and domestic violence. _** **_Pearson and Jones can run for their seats again in a special election. _**[**_We must send them back to the state house, because Republicans cannot get away with racism and attacks on our democracy._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e18435a-f240-4fb5-9981-5659df6c1200/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Will you join Blue Amp in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the courageous Justin Jones and Justin Pearson as they run to win back the seats Republicans just stole from them and their constituents?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T132b0175-9ba5-4c43-ba81-08c7e29484ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for never giving in to attacks on our democracy._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T801d9341-1d58-4b39-b0bf-3ea8b7250dfd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/tennesseeexpulsions-pearsonjones3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5fe78735-4f0b-435d-8dd2-1a68af79faa0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Chairman Kyle Hupfer and the Indiana Republican Party
subject: He is Risen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Wishing you a joyous Easter Sunday!
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/b5f95419604a4284/77283dcef05db22bc3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Hoosier Republican,

Before the day passes, we’d like to take a moment to wish all who celebrate a very joyous Easter! Today is a special day to commemorate the resurrection of Jesus Christ and reflect on His gift of salvation.

---
---
Whether you’re attending church, hosting an Easter egg hunt, or just enjoying dinner with your family, we hope you have a wonderful Easter Sunday!
— Chairman Kyle Hupfer and Indiana Republican Party
---

clean_body: Wishing you a joyous Easter Sunday! | | | Hoosier Republican, Before the day passes, we’d like to take a moment to wish all who celebrate a very joyous Easter! Today is a special day to commemorate the resurrection of Jesus Christ and reflect on His gift of salvation. Whether you’re attending church, hosting an Easter egg hunt, or just enjoying dinner with your family, we hope you have a wonderful Easter Sunday! — Chairman Kyle Hupfer and Indiana Republican Party | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. WWW.INDIANA.GOP. id:2023-01-27-14:17:08:240t | | id:2023-03-27-18:50:37:978t

**Our challenge to Arizona 's sham election just got a major boost.
**
I've said it before, and I'll say it again.

They messed with the wrong woman. Don't poke a mama bear.

The High Court is now forcing the Lower Court to rectify **THEIR FAILURE TO EXAMINE MY BOMBSHELL SIGNATURE VERIFICATION EVIDENCE!**

Signature Verification has been the third rail for Maricopa County for the past few years, and now we have a chance to show the world one way that corrupt officials stole this election.

However, Johnson took the lead around [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | #### [ Jim Jordan Goes On The Attack, Subpoenas Manhattan District Trump Prosecutor On Thursday, House Judiciary Chair Jim Jordan issued a subpoena for Mark Pomerantz, a former prosecutor for the Manhattan District Attorney’s Office who was involved in investigating former President Trump. This action marks an escalation in the ongoing investigation into the DA’s office, which began after Trump predicted his arrest in connection with the probe. [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | #### [ Former NCAA Swimmer Assaulted After Saving Women's Sports Speech Riley Gaines, a former NCAA swimmer, found herself barricaded in a room at San Francisco State University on Thursday night, after she was physically assaulted by protesters. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f7dd6677cc6c4b1c93233774034d6701&_e=I5bvEzRsGHhiIUEp_cE5IOLhXp0pxNtwvp4e4oCmwMEQUZ8ADuwsHUIyoUOubtOXOqW0e_f0t3E2ufeupn6uMjy17OZ4bTiuE9zQ25llmJhS-KifzBnqmZll4OI6iuZC1uXwPrHEV7TYF3m_lwLonxy4-1WlTuTL_up4pn0JxO_j4Fho1zW-6MbkrR9tczD2EAZ9gvhFn1YXVTNRLRSaAPxsfSX5YO9Aa67398stjHO-eX38UVIaSLhOgCD4YduNMaWSLKUonY_D19VjuwEQNw6Q4Ud15P1ntUdNyStfsw-NSh-k4Rct_qsL6MhaT3VqcOv8_LVA7QEIprrt9twV72BJmp9WEYghWX-865gtDzEWaOjufZBMVfp5aUV8Utf6whC4jmDxST1PmbKqEGkdh87yTYMxHUPw04GqBpF4Hrk%3D) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you--a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the "Liberty Walk" statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale 's Michigan campus_--one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f7dd6677cc6c4b1c93233774034d6701&_e=I5bvEzRsGHhiIUEp_cE5IOLhXp0pxNtwvp4e4oCmwMEQUZ8ADuwsHUIyoUOubtOXOqW0e_f0t3E2ufeupn6uMjy17OZ4bTiuE9zQ25llmJhS-KifzBnqmZll4OI6iuZC1uXwPrHEV7TYF3m_lwLonxy4-1WlTuTL_up4pn0JxO_j4Fho1zW-6MbkrR9tczD2EAZ9gvhFn1YXVTNRLRSaAPxsfSX5YO9Aa67398stjHO-eX38UVIaSLhOgCD4YduNMaWSLKUonY_D19VjuwEQNye7fohEJk6tL-miQZ3Ley2j9XRQaLSKQW_XiBSTbGssLzpXgO6eFz7zfJteTnUkIQO2V0FQqTkk8FYVMwubMRb35_FuSVj-XoQiDYnlIOiYqIJAPRknS1YedLCIY61MUs930w9F5Ay80_6dgjZqASI%3D) Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty--especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. ** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I've been thinking about this for a long time. Here's one primary reason... For decades, the "progressive" leftist academics who became dominant in most of America's colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project" is a prime example. According to the "1619 Project," the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery--and the Project's main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America's K-12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted--out of ignorance--to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the "progressive" Left's influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of "political correctness." The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of "progress" until it has "canceled" patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past--many of whom are depicted on the cards I'd like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. ** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you --citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty--we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation's youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _ The New York Times_' "1619 Project" that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America's great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will... **
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of _Imprimis_ ...for life).

* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.

* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale's free online courses such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope."

* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our "Liberty Walk." The cards are a thank you for your support. ** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f7dd6677cc6c4b1c93233774034d6701&_e=I5bvEzRsGHhiIUEp_cE5IOLhXp0pxNtwvp4e4oCmwMEQUZ8ADuwsHUIyoUOubtOXOqW0e_f0t3E2ufeupn6uMjy17OZ4bTiuE9zQ25llmJhS-KifzBnqmZll4OI6iuZC1uXwPrHEV7TYF3m_lwLonxy4-1WlTuTL_up4pn0JxO_j4Fho1zW-6MbkrR9tczD2EAZ9gvhFn1YXVTNRLRSaAPxsfSX5YO9Aa67398stjHO-eX38UVIaSLhOgCD4YduNMaWSLKUonY_D19VjuwEQN3wgpu6jSGFv80ODd97EjOPUEmkd-50wwSeWbwz6KNrQRbW4C86rC49lKdwWjR5ND2l0qmhhD9usuTfjMT9T1xA_zVcG66t453sp8ezX7zu4VMGJVqYdlkRFQcp9zw_I-xvT8XiH3QJIR-GUxFbMjPw%3D) After receiving your notecards, I hope you'll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale's many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times '_ "1619 Project." It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty --no matter the cost. ** Warm regards, Bill Gray Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Freedom Nation Today

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

name: DNC Chair Jaime Harrison
subject: I’m grateful for y’all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Ahead of our Easter celebrations, I wanted to take a minute to thank you. | |
---
Derek -- one of my favorite Easter traditions is to sit down with my wife and kids and dye eggs together. Now, Marie is a lot better at it than me, some of her dyed eggs were even featured in a magazine, but I’m still grateful for the time spent with my family. Ahead of our Easter celebrations, I wanted to take a minute to thank you, Derek. Everyone here at DNC HQ -- myself included -- considers you a part of our family, and I think it’s important you know that. There’s never been a more crucial time to elect leaders who will work to protect Medicare and Social Security, secure voting rights for every eligible American, lower costs for working families, and so much more. _And you are such a crucial part of that effort._ It means the world to me, President Biden and Vice President Harris, Democrats in Congress, and everyone at the DNC. **So, again, from the bottom of my heart, thank you.** Wherever you are, I hope you have a very restful Sunday surrounded by the ones you love. More soon, \- JH

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Wishing you a happy Easter and Passover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Wishing you and your family a warm Easter weekend

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: Can we have just 1 minute of your time?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
We need to hear what issues and candidates matter to you most this upcoming quarter
#
Friends -
Last Tuesday, we accomplished what Mandela set out to do when he launched The Long Run — we made a difference. With your support, we raised nearly $30,000 for Judge Janet Protasiewicz in Wisconsin’s critical Supreme Court race. And that funding helped bring a liberal majority to the Wisconsin Supreme Court for the first time in 14 years.
We made that difference together.
So as we begin this next phase of The Long Run and choose which critical races we want to leave our mark on, we want to hear what issues, races, and candidates you would like us to prioritize. Because as much as we want to, we cannot fight for every candidate that needs support right away.
[**Can you take a moment to complete our official April priorities survey for The Long Run? Use this link to take our quick one-minute survey.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230406_priorities_survey/?source=em230409-1-t1&refcode2=4345.196590.eHuw6Z&t=1&akid=4345%2E196590%2EeHuw6Z)
Mandela and The Long Run need to hear directly from you about the priorities you care about most because your authentic input is what makes this movement powerful and meaningful.
What you share today _will directly inform our decisions this month,_ so the more people who weigh in, the better Mandela and The Long Run can understand what's top of mind for people across the country.
We want to make sure your voice is heard, loud and clear, before making any key decisions. [**So please take a minute to take our quick priorities survey today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230406_priorities_survey/?source=em230409-1-t1&refcode2=4345.196590.eHuw6Z&t=2&akid=4345%2E196590%2EeHuw6Z)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230406_priorities_survey/?source=em230409-1-t1&refcode2=4345.196590.eHuw6Z&t=3&akid=4345%2E196590%2EeHuw6Z)
Thank you in advance for taking the time to share your input today.
The team at the Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4345%2E196590%2EeHuw6Z). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=4345%2E196590%2EeHuw6Z)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=4345_196590_eHuw6Z&akid=4345%2E196590%2EeHuw6Z)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=4345%2E196590%2EeHuw6Z)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

body:
Will you take one minute or less to share your thoughts on John’s legislative priorities?
#
Derek,
Team Fetterman here — THANK you for being part of this team and having John’s back these last weeks. 💪💪💪
As John returns to the Senate and prepares for the next Senate session, we want to hear from you.
So we want to ask: **What issues are the most important to you right now?**
**[Will you take one minute (or less) to share your thoughts on what you think John’s legislative priorities should be? Our team will review each + every response.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-20230409/?source=em20230409-1-8326&akid=8326%2E434096%2E91yyx7)**
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-20230409/?source=em20230409-8326&akid=8326%2E434096%2E91yyx7)**
John has never shied away from the toughest and most urgent issues facing our Commonwealth, and he’s in the U.S. Senate to fight for working folks + families. That's a commitment we take *super* seriously, which is why as we pack up to head back to D.C., we wanted to pause for a sec to get your thoughts on what our priorities should be.
John’s work has always been about the people, so **[can you share your thoughts via our priorities survey? We really want to know what you think John’s top goals should be in the Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/em-priorities-survey-20230409/?source=em20230409-1-8326&akid=8326%2E434096%2E91yyx7)**
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts. Your continued support means so much to our team. 🙏
—Team Fetterman

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62535455:JHJwvSGNN:m:1:3331421248:F81441260103F55CEDADA5CBFF3812FC:r)Dear Peter,

**[Please give a crucial donation IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62535455:JHJwvSGNN:m:1:3331421248:F81441260103F55CEDADA5CBFF3812FC:r)**

There's growing panic in the Washington, D.C. Swamp as you read this email.

Both Democrats and RINOs in Congress and in the national media are terrified by Tucker Carlson's release of U.S. Capitol camera footage this week.

**As a generous supporter of Freedom Watch, you know this is a good sign.**

Thanks to Tucker, millions of Americans are seeing for themselves that the official narrative about a "violent insurrection" at the U.S. Capitol building on January 6, 2021 is a pack of lies!

**People across the country who bought the "violent insurrection" pitch now know:**

* The protester known as Q Shaman was not violent, and he was actually escorted peacefully by U.S. Capitol Police throughout the Capitol building,

* US Capitol Police officer Brian Sicknick was alive and on the job after he had been allegedly murdered by protesters with a fire extinguisher,

* Someone doctored video footage of the protest, and added in yells and screams to make the event seem scarier.

**President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason.**

Tens of millions more Americans will know this crucial information within two weeks, as their family, friends, and neighbors spread the word in person and on social media.

What's more, that critical video footage may help me defend my clients and all January 6 peaceful protesters...we'll know soon!

**[Please help me fight back as hard as I can for each abused, ignored, and tortured January 6 peaceful protester with your special gift now of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62535455:JHJwvSGNN:m:1:3331421248:F81441260103F55CEDADA5CBFF3812FC:r)**

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman

name: Hillsdale College via Brave Conservatives
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534702:JqffvSGNA:m:1:3365131770:87F1FDA40674F09F79FE490440456B7A:r) Dear Peter, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives but supported by many well-meaning Americans to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue, views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534702:JqffvSGNA:m:1:3365131770:87F1FDA40674F09F79FE490440456B7A:r) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics, too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as Constitution 101 and a€oeThe Great American Story: A Land of Hope
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty, including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534702:JqffvSGNA:m:1:3365131770:87F1FDA40674F09F79FE490440456B7A:r) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been pursuing truth and defending liberty. Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18926?t=1001&akid=3128%2E346206%2EHt63-y ][IMG]
Peter,

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor
in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going
to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and
the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs
to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I
worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in
Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht,
the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving
relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an
America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned
growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re
going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18926?t=1002&akid=3128%2E346206%2EHt63-y ]Can you please split a $25 contribution between Charles Booker and my
United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so
important.

CHIP IN →

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to
sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do
yet, either.

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230409-3128-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3128_346206_Ht63-y&akid=3128%2E346206%2EHt63-y

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3128%2E346206%2EHt63-y

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:
Will you help us set the record straight? [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61528360/400389980/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjE3NzdjMy1lZmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eD6dZOPEpNlWrvun5L1QFVkXLX_ih6FSFPyYv9M1e1s=&emci=541777c3-efd6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=561777c3-efd6-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Let’s get this straight, Peter. **FIRST,** some Republicans in Congress pushed for cuts to Social Security and Medicare — bedrock social programs relied upon by millions of American families. **THEN,** the National Republican Senate Committee spent a fortune on attack ads in Pennsylvania...implying that _Bob_ is the one threatening Medicare benefits?! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61528362/400389982/-1917171699?refcode=em20230409&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjE3NzdjMy1lZmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eD6dZOPEpNlWrvun5L1QFVkXLX_ih6FSFPyYv9M1e1s=)
_^Us to the GOP_ **NOW,** we’re asking for your help to set the record straight, Peter. **[Will you make a donation of any amount today to fight back against the NRSC’s false attack ads? It’s up to us to ensure that Pennsylvania voters know who’s really fighting for their benefits in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61528364/400389984/-1917171699?refcode=em20230409&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjE3NzdjMy1lZmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eD6dZOPEpNlWrvun5L1QFVkXLX_ih6FSFPyYv9M1e1s=)** _Hint: It’s NOT the GOP._ **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61528366/400389986/-1917171699?refcode=em20230409&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjE3NzdjMy1lZmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eD6dZOPEpNlWrvun5L1QFVkXLX_ih6FSFPyYv9M1e1s=)** We shouldn’t have to say this, but we will anyway: Older Americans fought our wars, taught our children, worked in our factories, and helped build our middle class. clean_body: Will you help us set the record straight? Let’s get this straight, Peter. FIRST, some Republicans in Congress pushed for cuts to Social Security and Medicare — bedrock social programs relied upon by millions of American families. THEN, the National Republican Senate Committee spent a fortune on attack ads in Pennsylvania...implying that Bob is the one threatening Medicare benefits?! = ^Us to the GOP NOW, we’re asking for your help to set the record straight, Peter. = Hint: It’s NOT the GOP. = We shouldn’t have to say this, but we will anyway: Older Americans fought our wars, taught our children, worked in our factories, and helped build our middle class. They’re our mothers and fathers, grandmothers and grandfathers. It’s our duty to care for the generations that came before us. Bob takes that duty seriously — and he’s long been committed to protecting and strengthening Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid for all who need it. But not the GOP. Worse, they’re dumping a fortune into attack ads to smear Bob’s record when members of their own party are the actual problem... We can’t let these new attacks slide. = Thank you for pitching in, Team Casey | Help Bob Casey defend the Democratic Senate majority. Chip in. subject: National organizations, local leaders, and YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Every endorsement, donation, and person like you sharing Lucas’ message early in this race could make all the difference on Election Day.
#
Our movement is gaining momentum, Peter.
After Josh Hawley continued to prove that he’s a fraud and a coward by refusing to protect Social Security benefits, attacking workers, and using family farmers as campaign props, national organizations + local leaders have started to throw their support behind Lucas Kunce.
From Social Security Works PAC to former elected officials like lieutenant governor Joe Maxwell to local labor unions like Insulators Local 1 — they know Lucas will fight like hell for everyday people in the U.S. Senate.
**So now, we’re asking for one more critical endorsement — from you.[Will you join the tens of thousands of everyday people supporting our movement to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by adding your personal endorsement of Lucas Kunce today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230409_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=2975%2E614464%2EuC7fNn)**
**[Add your endorsement »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230409_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=2975%2E614464%2EuC7fNn)**
Lucas’ bold message of taking back power for everyday people has already put a national spotlight on Missouri’s U.S. Senate race. But Josh Hawley and all the GOP insiders lining up to support him are determined to tear our movement down.
It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of grassroots support to elect Lucas Kunce, defeat Josh Hawley, and finally put real working people in charge of our country — and that’s exactly why we’re reaching out for your support so early in this race. **So Peter:**
**[Will you join the national organizations, local leaders, and everyday people throwing their support behind Lucas Kunce by adding your personal endorsement today?**](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20230409_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=2975%2E614464%2EuC7fNn)

Every endorsement, donation, and person like you sharing Lucas’ message early in this race could make all the difference on Election Day.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Team Lucas Kunce

name: Jake Evans
subject: Celebrating Easter - Remembering the Resurrection of Jesus
body:
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | **" He is not here; he has risen!"****Luke 2:6-7**
---
| Dear Friends, As we come together to celebrate Easter this year, I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a very Happy Easter. This season serves as a powerful reminder of the hope and renewal found in the story of Jesus Christ – his death on the cross and his triumphant resurrection from the dead. During this time, let us pause and reflect on the profound sacrifice Jesus made for us all and the everlasting love and forgiveness he demonstrated. Through his propitious resurrection, Jesus conquered death and opened the door to eternal life, bringing light and hope to the world. May the risen Christ warm your hearts now and always.
---
| Blessings,
---
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | | Jake, Baylie & Cullen Evans
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
| | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62536943:6HQWKSG1N:m:1:3391001263:E1791FCBE6A1CF906497030195C4C4C3:r)
---
Peter,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62536943:6HQWKSG1N:m:1:3391001263:E1791FCBE6A1CF906497030195C4C4C3:r)**

---
Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.
Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom.
_**Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country.**_
Thank you,
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62536943:6HQWKSG1N:m:1:3391001263:E1791FCBE6A1CF906497030195C4C4C3:r)

For years, Republicans have had the advantage – building their majorities in chambers and destroying progress on abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, and gun safety laws. But we are right on their heels – we have shown that when grassroots Democrats stand together, we can get real work done!
**It’s true:** Just this year, we have won 14 special elections, defying odds and breaking barriers for communities. And if we continue to build our grassroots power, there is no stopping what we can do.
**The contrast is clear – Democrats are focused on protecting our rights, while Republicans are doing everything they can to take them away.**
[Can you step up and chip in $7 or whatever feels right to elect state Democrats who will fight alongside Michelle Obama and Jill Biden?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OIbSiTaEG6BsFXpFKiLiNY_FFdjAWrGJQ4OED4MLVmtCx5oK_BeKw5fTl3a3rNrluGT2-5sXdAWS9Fx7S9fbNXkNSSY9SySD3BmHcJINP5YEnpnhQxSb147hxScrcty1B3W53tTQt7iBbUIi8jg9UQwuE7KWK0rVfOrDLHEs4NLlUE_hSW21AcqLqaGdlH2xlFXFUbCxPJBFg85Hi80663I95f_D2kluz-_eidqFWQO3ToKuWMGxe-4DKLaZWLLpie8c_daR6ZClMIykNpCttmvYsF_1C7a7TL9-39sjzFynk7oeGjsNesrxYaDFiGzYSUyJ_YeybFuK7ZVpfRvzy_N1V72eIJ4c3lEgrlL867lHP4aMUkytfTqJArM0efnfmuX3oI9Z1rNVKfsoFZHc30VrPl6tnRWPG9C2duzqUHpuL0CNQ5LXpPy6f9QgePIaWzJ0E73jCTSBgKMc8okSoVbGOSC6-N_3FByfqBNpPb3vHapxOO9F41V4uxt76oxxN73nlY2xk8G601H-4TrK_M0/3v7/YUyPyfVDQwid9U9686luVg/h8/aLMbZHf0zuVS1BpEMFreQR6d9G7Hi9AYlkO0v0IztpM)

I’m going to be honest with you, Peter: Our fundraising has taken a significant dip since the election last year. And the thing is, I get it. It’s the “off year.” Folks check out of politics for a bit. But the fact is, there is no off season for us. We work 24/7, year-round, in order to secure wins for our endorsed candidates and our legislative priorities. When our supporters check out, it means we have fewer resources to get the job done. [_**That’s why today I’m asking you to commit to a monthly donation to HER Time. Knowing we have your $3 or $10 coming in the door every month will help us plan a long term strategy, and get us through the months when fundraising slows down. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61530038/400396401/-253429511?recurring=on&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230409_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVhYjA1NDUtZjZkNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8s2SSqlWMh3JCx9mq_stUlaCQ-HcQxFDzdscHzum6Kw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your monthly donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61530039/400396402/-253429511?recurring=on&express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230409_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVhYjA1NDUtZjZkNi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8s2SSqlWMh3JCx9mq_stUlaCQ-HcQxFDzdscHzum6Kw=)

Thanks so much,

clean_body: | = I’m going to be honest with you, Peter: Our fundraising has taken a significant dip since the election last year. And the thing is, I get it. It’s the “off year.” Folks check out of politics for a bit. But the fact is, there is no off season for us. We work 24/7, year-round, in order to secure wins for our endorsed candidates and our legislative priorities. When our supporters check out, it means we have fewer resources to get the job done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your monthly donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Early and consistent investments win elections, so I’m hoping I can count on your support to stick with us for the long haul. We’re building a lasting, sustainable movement — and your participation is critical. Thanks so much, Katie P.S. I understand that not everyone can commit to a monthly gift right now. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: My existence makes a lot of people mad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
I am the youngest woman in U.S. history to be elected to Congress. I was a waitress. I am Latina. I come from a low income background and am one of just a few working class people who get elected to Congress.
That makes a lot of classist, ageist, misogynist, and racist people mad.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230409.VyiiKy&refcode=em20230409-4099-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4099%2E2526796%2Ekcmn2x)
But together, we’ve built a movement fighting for transformative change — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics.
[If you’d like to help support our movement, could you donate $16 or anything you can afford right now to keep our movement strong? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230409.VyiiKy&refcode=em20230409-4099-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4099%2E2526796%2Ekcmn2x)
**[Contribute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230409.VyiiKy&refcode=em20230409-4099-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4099%2E2526796%2Ekcmn2x)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230409?refcode=em20230409-4099-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=22&refcode2=4099_2526796_kcmn2x&akid=4099%2E2526796%2Ekcmn2x)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230409-4099-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=23&akid=4099%2E2526796%2Ekcmn2x)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4099%2E2526796%2Ekcmn2x) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4099%2E2526796%2Ekcmn2x) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4099%2E2526796%2Ekcmn2x)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62536942:JsVddSGNY:m:1:3331421248:12A5596CCAE7ACBEBB4CF9D690551681:r)
---
Peter,
I never thought this could happen in America - but it has.
**The travesty you witnessed was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out.**
_Let me be as clear as possible:**I AM INNOCENT.**_
The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it.
**What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order.**
Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now.
_They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country._
**The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission.**
If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me.
Their grip will close even tighter around **YOU.**
As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way.
But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA.
**[Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA- for 1,500% impact.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62536942:JsVddSGNY:m:1:3331421248:12A5596CCAE7ACBEBB4CF9D690551681:r)**

Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about.
In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy.
Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission.
They spied on my campaign.
They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier.
**And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice.**
They have crossed one line after another.
They have no shame.
They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense.
**Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it.**
EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt.
These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated.
Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought.
We will be one country again.

clean_body: | | | Peter, I never thought this could happen in America - but it has. The travesty you witnessed was led by a Soros-backed attorney acting on behalf of Joe Biden 's Department of Justice to INDICT me on FALSE charges - even after the statute of limitations had run out. Let me be as clear as possible:I AM INNOCENT. The only offense I have committed is to defend America from those who seek to destroy it. What we 've witnessed is election interference in the highest order. Let me assure you - I have never been more determined than I am right now. They will not beat me. They will not break me. They will not stop me from fighting to save this country. The more they try to frame me, slander me, and destroy me, the stronger my resolve to complete our mission. If these illegal persecutions succeed, if they're allowed to set fire to the law, then it will not stop with me. Their grip will close even tighter around YOU. As I've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. But I will continue to stand in their way. And right now, for the sake of our country, I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side and SAVE AMERICA. | Every citizen should understand what this persecution is really about. In 2016, we overthrew a corrupt political establishment that believes they're entitled to a permanent rule over the American people -- and they went crazy. Before I even raised my hand from the Bible at my Inauguration, they tried to beat America back into submission. They spied on my campaign. They tried to frame me as a Russian agent using a phony dossier. And when I confronted their lies, the monsters tried to charge me with obstruction of justice. They have crossed one line after another. They have no shame. They are persecuting me because I am fighting the corrupt people who have dragged us into endless wars, censored our speech, abolished our borders, and sought wealth and power at your expense. Our country is dying - and we are the only ones who can save it. EVERY American who believes in justice and the rule of law must stand against this witch hunt. These tyrants cannot be rewarded. They must be completely and unconditionally defeated. Once their hatred and division are stopped, we will find that we have much more in common than we thought. We will be one country again. Together, we will deliver a great rebirth of American freedom. Pray for me. Pray for my family. Most importantly, pray for our country. Thank you, | Donald J.
