name: Michael Bennet
subject: A Texas judge just banned abortion pills
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
Another blow to women’s reproductive rights. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61531465/400402085/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmUxNjVlMS1mYmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i4RZ6mWQ5XifvK2dBvhHwxRvIb999bflyY7Ftx6CvYE=)
Folks, Late Friday night, a federal judge in Texas ruled that mifepristone — a medication approved by the FDA and used by millions of women in need of abortion care for over 20 years — should be banned. This is a decision with no basis in scientific or medical evidence and is yet another blow to women’s reproductive rights following the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade last June. With states across the country passing draconian measures to criminalize abortions and punish women, medications like these have become essential for women in need of safe access to reproductive health care. In many cases, these pills are saving lives. While Coloradans have safe access to reproductive care, rulings like this affect women nationwide. Many of my Republican colleagues in the Senate want to go even further. They have made it clear that they want a federal law to ban abortion nationwide — including right here in Colorado. **Folks, we can’t let that happen.[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61531466/400402086/-633469963?refcode=X_040823_tx_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmUxNjVlMS1mYmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i4RZ6mWQ5XifvK2dBvhHwxRvIb999bflyY7Ftx6CvYE=)** **[Will you please split a donation between Planned Parenthood Action Fund and my campaign so we can continue our work to protect women’s access to healthcare across the country? No one should be denied care because of their zip code.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61531467/400402087/-633469963?refcode=X_040823_tx_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmUxNjVlMS1mYmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i4RZ6mWQ5XifvK2dBvhHwxRvIb999bflyY7Ftx6CvYE=)** A woman's health care decisions should be between herself and her doctor, not the government. Colorado is a safe haven for women seeking reproductive care, but women across the country are already facing the consequences of a post-Roe landscape. We’re waging this fight from every direction and your contribution today will help us elect pro-choice Democrats so we can codify Roe, pass the EACH Act, and fight back against my Republican colleagues and their nationwide abortion ban, while supporting the work that Planned Parenthood Action Fund does across the country every day. [**Click here to make a donation in this fight to restore the right to choose nationwide >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61531468/400402088/-633469963?refcode=X_040823_tx_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmUxNjVlMS1mYmQ2LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i4RZ6mWQ5XifvK2dBvhHwxRvIb999bflyY7Ftx6CvYE=) As always, thank you for your support, team, Michael |

From myself and all of us here at Team Nikki, we’re sending you and your family best wishes on this joyous holiday.

- Nikki

body:
Wishing you and your loved ones a blessed Easter.
| | | Happy Easter, Friend!
Before the day gets away from us, I hope you’ll join me in taking a moment to reflect on the true meaning of Easter and thank God for his many blessings in our lives.
---
---
Whether you're attending church services or just enjoying the springtime weather, I wish you and your loved ones a wonderful Easter Sunday and a restful holiday weekend!
-Troy E. Nehls

name: Ready for Ron
subject: Where Woke goes to die
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62535286:JxagHSGzN:m:1:3331421248:B82E59F1B4974F9D3E3DFF2762EDA0DF:r)
---
| | Fellow American. "Our bottom line is we do not surrender to the woke mob. Florida is where woke goes to die." Those were the words of Governor Ron DeSantis made in a recent speech in Michigan. The differences between Florida and Michigan could not be more stark. Michigan is a state that was rebounding from the recession until Democrats took over, repealed Right-To-Work, increased taxes, and sent their economy into a freefall. Meanwhile, Florida, under the leadership of Ron DeSantis has seen an enormous economic boom all while passing policies to protect families, business owners, and taxpayers. What do you want our nation to look more like, Michigan or Florida? A state on the brink of disaster or a state that is prospering? The only way to take the Florida Blueprint nationwide is to elect Ron DeSantis as our 47th President in November of 2024. And that's exactly what we intend to do. [**If you agree, I 'm asking you to make a donation of any amount today to help us build the grassroots team that Ron DeSantis needs the second he announces his campaign for President.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62535286:JxagHSGzN:m:1:3331421248:B82E59F1B4974F9D3E3DFF2762EDA0DF:r) Ready for Ron has already gathering signatures from nearly 250,000 individuals calling for Ron DeSantis to run for President. And we're not slowing down. In fact, we're gearing up to run even more digital and TV ads, hire more grassroots organizers, and connect with millions more voters. But we can't do that with your help. [**So please, if you think that America needs Ron DeSantis and the Florida Blueprint in the Oval Office, make a donation of any amount to Ready for Ron today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62535286:JxagHSGzN:m:1:3331421248:B82E59F1B4974F9D3E3DFF2762EDA0DF:r)
---
| | [**DONATE $50 NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62535286:JxagHSGzN:m:1:3331421248:B82E59F1B4974F9D3E3DFF2762EDA0DF:r)
---
| | Governor DeSantis has boldly taken on dangerous woke ideology in Florida. Now, we need Governor DeSantis to take on and destroy wokeness from coast to coast. It's up to us to build a massive wave of grassroots support so if - and when - he announces he's in, he'll have the grassroots army to lead to victory. And we can only do that with your help.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
Dan Backer **_Ready For Ron_**
---
[DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62535286:JxagHSGzN:m:1:3331421248:B82E59F1B4974F9D3E3DFF2762EDA0DF:r)
---
| | _Ready for Ron is a grassroots effort dedicated to drafting Ron DeSantis for President in 2024. Your support is critical to making sure this effort succeeds in order to get America back on track. _
---
_Our efforts depend on the support of America-First patriots like you. So if you'd like to donate, **[please donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62535286:JxagHSGzN:m:1:3331421248:B82E59F1B4974F9D3E3DFF2762EDA0DF:r)** Thank you. _
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62535286:JxagHSGzN:m:1:3331421248:B82E59F1B4974F9D3E3DFF2762EDA0DF:r)
---
For inquiries, please call: (561) 291-9897. To view the full petition text, please visit: [https://www.readyforron.com/draft/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62535285:JxagHSGzN:m:1:3331421248:B82E59F1B4974F9D3E3DFF2762EDA0DF:r "https://www.readyforron.com/draft/") By signing this petition and providing your information, you are requesting to have Ready for Ron provide it to Governor DeSantis. Use of the name and likeness of any candidate or officeholder is for the purpose of this PACs political communication only and IN NO WAY indicates any authorization by, affiliation with, direction from, or endorsement by that person of any kind. Contributions or gifts to the Ready for Ron are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes and will be used in connection with federal elections. Contributions from federal government contractors, national banks, or foreign nationals or entities are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. By submitting the form above, you certify the following statements are true and accurate: 1. This contribution is made from your personal funds, not from the general treasury funds of a corporation, union, or national bank, and will not be reimbursed by another person or entity; 2. This contribution is made by a U.S. citizen, lawfully admitted permanent U.S. resident (i.e. Green Card holder), and not a foreign national or entity, federal government contractor, or national bank; and 3. Contributions from individuals up to $5,000 per year are designated to the RFR candidate contribution account, and any amount in excess of $5,000 per year is designated to the RFR Carey account. **When you provide a phone number, you will also be opted into our text message campaigns, which are sent using peer-to-peer technology. Msg. and data rates may apply. Subject to Terms and Conditions. You may unsubscribe at any time by responding "Stop" or "Cancel".

name: 2024 Republican Platform Survey
subject: Your input is needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534767:JklHhSGN6:m:1:3365131770:80BFFE35AAC8AEDF23CEFAD32F5DA2B2:r)

[2024 REPUBLICAN PLATFORM SURVEY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534767:JklHhSGN6:m:1:3365131770:80BFFE35AAC8AEDF23CEFAD32F5DA2B2:r)
_[An Official Project of the National Republican Senatorial Committee](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534767:JklHhSGN6:m:1:3365131770:80BFFE35AAC8AEDF23CEFAD32F5DA2B2:r)_

Peter,

Do you have a quick moment?

Republican leaders and our top Senators are convening a MAJOR meeting to set our platform for 2024, _and they need your assistance. _

_**Your opinions, concerns, and interests need to be heard by Republican Party leaders as we formulate our 2024 campaign platform.**_

That's why you have been selected to participate in this historic, touchstone grassroots survey, the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534767:JklHhSGN6:m:1:3365131770:80BFFE35AAC8AEDF23CEFAD32F5DA2B2:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534767:JklHhSGN6:m:1:3365131770:80BFFE35AAC8AEDF23CEFAD32F5DA2B2:r)

2024 is the best chance our Party has to secure a Senate Majority for the next 10 YEARS - an entire decade. That's why we **must accurately grasp what issues and opinions our grassroots supporters care about the most.**

Your response is crucial because it represents your city, and our Nationwide survey cannot be complete without YOUR response.

**[Please submit YOUR RESPONSE to the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to ensure your answers are recorded and set our Platform for 2024.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534767:JklHhSGN6:m:1:3365131770:80BFFE35AAC8AEDF23CEFAD32F5DA2B2:r)**

Make no mistake, the **2024 election** will be one of the most consequential political battles of our lifetime, so it's ESSENTIAL we get this right - we only have ONE shot.

Our team wants to present your response FIRST, so you must submit your form before 4/3/2023. Thank you in advance for your support!

**[Take the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey to represent your city and set the Official Republican Platform for 2024!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534767:JklHhSGN6:m:1:3365131770:80BFFE35AAC8AEDF23CEFAD32F5DA2B2:r)**

Thank you,

NRSC Team

name: Hillsdale College via Fierce America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534417:6My0hSGN5:m:1:3391001263:D1338AD059A7C7481F624D560A6A1915:r) Dear Peter, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives but supported by many well-meaning Americans to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue, views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534417:6My0hSGN5:m:1:3391001263:D1338AD059A7C7481F624D560A6A1915:r) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics, too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as Constitution 101 and a€oeThe Great American Story: A Land of Hope
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty, including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534417:6My0hSGN5:m:1:3391001263:D1338AD059A7C7481F624D560A6A1915:r) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been pursuing truth and defending liberty. Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: About Clarence Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Public trust in the Supreme Court was already at historic lows, and I wouldn’t be surprised if it just keeps getting worse. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61542703/400422057/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ12Z_JUD_E_20230409_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODJlNWQ1Ny0yOGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jk4Mh2mzEv9-EN5AM8iEvHugeeX3EUaf3YFGteqcgjs=&emci=072e5d57-28d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=082e5d57-28d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Public trust in the Supreme Court was already at historic lows — and I wouldn’t be surprised if it just keeps getting worse from here. This past week, news broke that Justice Clarence Thomas has been accepting undisclosed luxury travel gifts from GOP megadonor Harlan Crow — full of private jets, superyachts, and exclusive resorts. Look, when someone gets their day in court, they shouldn’t have to wonder whether their judge — or a Supreme Court justice — is looking out for wealthy donors instead of the rule of law. **This latest news is just a reminder that the judicial branch needs real ethics reform, from top to bottom. I’ve got a plan for that — the Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act.** From banning federal judges from owning individual stocks to overhauling the broken judicial recusal process, this bill would help root out corruption and restore public trust in the federal judiciary. But we have to fight side by side — as a grassroots movement — to get these reforms through Congress. [_**I’ll keep fighting to root corruption out of our federal judiciary, and I need you in this fight with me. Please add your name if you agree: Judges must follow a basic, binding code of ethics in order to sit on the bench.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61542704/400422058/1719796013?refcode=EMZ12Z_JUD_E_20230409_V1S1&ms=EMZ12Z_JUD_E_20230409_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODJlNWQ1Ny0yOGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jk4Mh2mzEv9-EN5AM8iEvHugeeX3EUaf3YFGteqcgjs=&emci=072e5d57-28d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=082e5d57-28d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61542705/400422059/1719796013?refcode=EMZ12Z_JUD_E_20230409_V1S1&ms=EMZ12Z_JUD_E_20230409_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODJlNWQ1Ny0yOGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jk4Mh2mzEv9-EN5AM8iEvHugeeX3EUaf3YFGteqcgjs=&emci=072e5d57-28d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=082e5d57-28d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Simply put, corruption is toxic to our democracy. Here are a few big pieces of how this bill would give Americans confidence that their judges are held to the highest ethical standards and are free from conflicts of interest:
* Banning federal judges from owning individual stocks and certain other investments.
* Strengthening restrictions on judicial gifts and privately funded travel.
* Imposing the existing Code of Conduct for U.S. Judges on the Supreme Court — the only court in the country not currently subject to a binding ethical code.
* Improving disclosure of judicial speeches and case assignments, while mandating the livestreaming of court proceedings.
* Closing the loophole that allows judges to escape accountability by retiring from the bench, strengthening disciplinary authority for the Judicial Conference, setting up expedited impeachment procedures for federal judges, and allowing the public to file complaints against Supreme Court Justices — like all other federal judges — through a new Supreme Court Complaints Review Committee.
* Limiting the ability of courts to seal records that contain important information for the protection of public health or safety, often concealed at the urging of massive corporations.

Beyond this bill, there’s more we can do to restore faith in an independent judiciary committed to the rule of law. I’ve been pushing to expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats to rebalance this institution that’s been hijacked by right-wing extremists. But let’s make progress by tackling corruption.
**There’s real momentum behind the judicial ethics reform. But now we need to show that the American people are raising their voices on this.**
[_**Will you add your name to say you support our Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act? Make your voice heard on this issue that is powerfully important to our democracy.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61542706/400422060/1719796013?refcode=EMZ12Z_JUD_E_20230409_V1S1&ms=EMZ12Z_JUD_E_20230409_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODJlNWQ1Ny0yOGQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jk4Mh2mzEv9-EN5AM8iEvHugeeX3EUaf3YFGteqcgjs=&emci=072e5d57-28d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=082e5d57-28d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

We'll miss you, but you can always [unsubscribe](https://action.elizabethwarren.com/p/mro2ZCtYVU2VH5ECFYaTwQ2?unsubscribedata=GEkIjvveV5u%2FgUHSq4xey762Mx2y0p19RT6ERt9DDxIz6kT6uLv6EYXblRAT8OCp285YFuGf%2FpDzfBG0E%2BTL0NPFxiDBm8O5iGAJ5oWGFcQd%2BKcaawKWcpCcJQ0lXewV%2Fu%2BdIhvmg7oCcR0GGdchpfkPKbvc6m%2BcK1INMHxZDjgS%2Br5%2BOc7SGmJ2nDx%2B58jvJOdRId25aHdhNfPuhadg%2FCfTsNOT5m3DhFybIgx3q%2BvdrHhsh5GkD5aNr3KBpakvGku1j7pDk5mD0z9%2BouK5wZHPepk%2FB04rXnhKgNYZTrYpZLLJCcmVe4sbR9Iprii3mPpUhhnfec%2BcijgezpQbWQfVgvPIojlxPmymSFiaGrWFRS%2FRwhHHFOz82p410qGL9FXi9WsaK17ejw3LVXVYCALUE42VMf1Bc80xYQRPVhU%3D).
clean_body: Public trust in the Supreme Court was already at historic lows, and I wouldn’t be surprised if it just keeps getting worse. | | | Public trust in the Supreme Court was already at historic lows — and I wouldn’t be surprised if it just keeps getting worse from here. This past week, news broke that Justice Clarence Thomas has been accepting undisclosed luxury travel gifts from GOP megadonor Harlan Crow — full of private jets, superyachts, and exclusive resorts. Look, when someone gets their day in court, they shouldn’t have to wonder whether their judge — or a Supreme Court justice — is looking out for wealthy donors instead of the rule of law. This latest news is just a reminder that the judicial branch needs real ethics reform, from top to bottom. I’ve got a plan for that — the Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act. From banning federal judges from owning individual stocks to overhauling the broken judicial recusal process, this bill would help root out corruption and restore public trust in the federal judiciary. But we have to fight side by side — as a grassroots movement — to get these reforms through Congress. | Simply put, corruption is toxic to our democracy. Here are a few big pieces of how this bill would give Americans confidence that their judges are held to the highest ethical standards and are free from conflicts of interest: Banning federal judges from owning individual stocks and certain other investments. Strengthening restrictions on judicial gifts and privately funded travel. Imposing the existing Code of Conduct for U.S. Judges on the Supreme Court — the only court in the country not currently subject to a binding ethical code. Improving disclosure of judicial speeches and case assignments, while mandating the livestreaming of court proceedings. Closing the loophole that allows judges to escape accountability by retiring from the bench, strengthening disciplinary authority for the Judicial Conference, setting up expedited impeachment procedures for federal judges, and allowing the public to file complaints against Supreme Court Justices — like all other federal judges — through a new Supreme Court Complaints Review Committee. Limiting the ability of courts to seal records that contain important information for the protection of public health or safety, often concealed at the urging of massive corporations. Beyond this bill, there’s more we can do to restore faith in an independent judiciary committed to the rule of law. I’ve been pushing to expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats to rebalance this institution that’s been hijacked by right-wing extremists. But let’s make progress by tackling corruption. There’s real momentum behind the judicial ethics reform. But now we need to show that the American people are raising their voices on this. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

**Every single Republican president since 1988, except George W. Bush in 2004, was elected WITHOUT winning the national popular vote.**
How is that "democratic," friend? When certain voices count more than others – as is the case with the Electoral College system – you know something is _seriously_ wrong.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Unprecedented judicial sneak attack on abortion access must be answered
body:
Massive abortion rights setback
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60a0369b-e991-4fa7-bca9-ad91eb8dcedc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Utter treachery and terrible policy.** _That's what we've gotten from an anti-choice zealot masquerading as a judge. We warned for months that Matthew J. Kacsmarkyk was a Republican in robe, a Trump-appointed nut forcing his personal set of superstitions and obsessions on all of us._ **_So, in a ruling that surprised nobody, with no legal, moral or health-based justification, he overturned the FDA's approval of the abortion pill, mifepristone, which has a record of overwhelming safety here and abroad. _** _Ruth Marcus of the Washington Post put it well:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8617c645-4d03-4e84-ab88-2010d257b521/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thankfully, a Washington State judge issued a competing decision to halt this lunacy from taking effect right away (we hope). _**_Yet, we need to fight this anti-democratic attack by a small man on the bodies of women across the country--yes, in blue states too._** [**_Will you please join us in donating $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the National Network of Abortion Funds to fund travel, childcare, shelter and more for women who will otherwise be emotionally and physically harmed by this decision._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd5b15ab-b30b-4623-b811-7a4e31472e4d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting every day for full equality in this country. Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T465da284-8932-4db1-a001-a07e0685a2f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/kacsmarykdecisionmifepristonefdaapproval-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tccb0d6a9-1c46-40ce-a05d-7b259722ec71/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: Our endeavor for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Smiley Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Smiley for Washington Inc
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534785:J1e_DSGNY:m:1:3365131770:48B8F8BF36E6454E2860193AA1054713:r)
---
Peter, It's Tiffany Smiley.
Last year, my Senate race made national headlines as I sent a 30-year incumbent scrambling to hold onto her seat.
And even though we didn't get the results we wanted, my battle for America is far from over.
You see, I'm not the kind of person who gives up after just one setback. I grew up on my family's farm in Washington where from a young age I learned the value of hard work.
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534785:J1e_DSGNY:m:1:3365131770:48B8F8BF36E6454E2860193AA1054713:r)
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534785:J1e_DSGNY:m:1:3365131770:48B8F8BF36E6454E2860193AA1054713:r)
---
| | It sparked my love of community, and inspired me to study to become an OBGYN nurse to help women during the most significant moments of their lives.
With my high school sweetheart Scotty, we had a life I could only dream of - until I received a call that changed everything. Scotty, who was serving in the U.S. Army in Iraq, had lost sight in both his eyes to a suicide bomber.
When I got to his side at Walter Reed, they asked me to sign a document on the spot that would prevent him from ever serving his country again.
---

| | **But I wouldn 't give up on his dream.**
Since then, I've dedicated my life to ensuring that every veteran gets the benefits and care they deserve - and Scotty went on to become America's first blind active-duty Army Officer.
My husband and I went up against the establishment in the U.S. military and won. And now, [I'm ready to take on the rest of the broken American bureaucracy.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534785:J1e_DSGNY:m:1:3365131770:48B8F8BF36E6454E2860193AA1054713:r)

I started my mission last year running for Senate in Washington, and now, I'm starting a new fight with **Endeavor PAC.**

When I was fighting for my husband Scotty's future, I saw that the bureaucracy in Washington fiercely protects its insiders while leaving hardworking Americans behind.

The resistance was tough, but we won - and now, I'm ready to win for the rest of America.

I'm not giving up on my mission to elect strong, freedom-loving leaders to the House and the Senate.

**The fight for 2024 is already underway,[and it's going to take each one of us doing our part to change how business is done in Washington.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534785:J1e_DSGNY:m:1:3365131770:48B8F8BF36E6454E2860193AA1054713:r)**
---

---
As someone who loves America, it pains me to see the radical Left and the DC establishment try to erode the freedoms that make our country strong. But I know that there are hardworking Americans out there who want to TRULY fight for our country and bring forward conservative solutions for families like yours and mine.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534785:J1e_DSGNY:m:1:3365131770:48B8F8BF36E6454E2860193AA1054713:r)
---
I'm not going to lie - the road ahead will be long and difficult. But I'm not about to give up anytime soon.
I'm ready to take on the forces that want to take away your freedoms, and today, you have a choice -[**will you stand with me for American freedom or let the DC establishment erode the country you love?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534785:J1e_DSGNY:m:1:3365131770:48B8F8BF36E6454E2860193AA1054713:r)

Through **Endeavor PAC** , we can build off of our momentum from our Senate campaign to elect strong conservatives from ALL walks of life that will tackle our border, our skyrocketing crime, out-of-control inflation, and so much more.
Our work is cut out for us, and any amount you can pitch into our mission will fuel the fight for maverick conservatives across America.
**[Now that you know my story, it 's time for us to write the next chapter in America's story together. Please, pitch in what you can now to fuel our fight to END business as usual in Washington and send the next generation of conservatives to the capitol.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62534785:J1e_DSGNY:m:1:3365131770:48B8F8BF36E6454E2860193AA1054713:r)**

name: Jon Tester
subject: Can I explain something?
body:
I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team | | |
---
| | Can I explain somethingfolks? I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat-grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents. In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate - **as a farmer.** Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive. I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand. The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded. **And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.** [ That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $10 between the **DLCC’s Grassroots Victory PAC** and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate and build Democratic power in state legislatures nationwide. Anything you can give makes a difference. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xFNoiblq38KuZLVCESESuKdDccTgq6ZmOJbi6HbJiKAjM0T095XFcbE7uBKHrtVDiDRVXCTnGqTA_E9Qz6ymxfsIBuOZpzV-06tCXMTys-TrTgAorvzN3HVLhwSZ6liSPfIXazYYHOoGuVHgS1I5oz4FDB769kl7QmSL4yTq9ZdVwe3ywcR0sHoIyGUNKtZ8_BG0r1ktHMckv2oH6HhOzyNbUHJ7dWYhtvlw4YiSelwf0Po9Ikgy9kvlIMvQrzyXp2zFHf9e93J0vuNB11P5bybTHGzTlyhdAOGZQebEvWUvcwQ8oq2KC9YTxwB6z4lkzhSuEZIrPD4l4usqv3e_ZzHYnJujdhv9_jrqh-5T3x5B_wwfbS8_YSE6lOBK600gc/3v7/UtI5M9FnSLypYCqRYmUhZA/h0/0sxGuK8vs4TFL7FgC1s-7lrBtHK0v-YNLyyIqL1nwpw) [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xFNoiblq38KuZLVCESESuKdDccTgq6ZmOJbi6HbJiKAjM0T095XFcbE7uBKHrtVDiDRVXCTnGqTA_E9Qz6ymxfsIBuOZpzV-06tCXMTys-TrTgAorvzN3HVLhwSZ6liSPfIXazYYHOoGuVHgS1I5oz4FDB769kl7QmSL4yTq9Zde8jg67nzaZySzSnNAuCpQKctERYR9Y2wxVmCGV6JlZJWq7dUoN0eAtLu0B_TUGyBIH28wh5L64ONRanQHZs3zqdsi_04uepmag5cSrPsspNBhPa1YBEKFIZyih_UZtlwsa6OwsPoQVUsoyjkAZznraRfUjfU-jjP61fhCdMHmX0U_KWdgS_7kjYG--z4PpeMRlm64oCayBIJrky4u9iZRE/3v7/UtI5M9FnSLypYCqRYmUhZA/h1/Vr5LuZEaXzolJT451Xngnt5n10FLkwarFcdHKOaHVH0) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Senator Jon Tester and DLCC's Grassroots Victory PAC.

clean_body: I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team | | | | | Can I explain somethingfolks? I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat-grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents. In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate - as a farmer. Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive. I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand. The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded. And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Senator Jon Tester and DLCC's Grassroots Victory PAC. | | | | | Thank you so much for sticking by me. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Bunnies, flowers, and butterflies 🐇💐🦋
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1713299?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | _Today, many people are celebrating Easter_ \-- a holiday that often signifies that spring has officially arrived. While bunnies might be on your mind, they aren’t the only backyard critters that are a beloved staple of this vibrant season. Monarch butterflies, with their iconic bright orange wings, can often be seen among the colorful budding flowers in your home garden. But this spring, you might be seeing far fewer of these backyard beauties -- because monarch populations are _**DRASTICALLY DECLINING.**_ We have already lost **90%** of these __**ENDANGERED**__ pollinators in large part due to the disappearance of milkweed -- a vital plant for monarch survival and the **ONLY source of food** for baby monarch caterpillars. Milkweed plants are being _WIPED OUT_ by a toxic chemical called _**glyphosate**_ , the active ingredient found in Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup. The pesticide giant has even **manipulated science** to **evade regulations** and **cover up the truth** about the _**_DANGERS_**_ of their flagship product. _**But real environmentalists like you won’t be deceived by Bayer-Monsanto’s harmful lies, Friend. **_ [**We know that you want to see accountability for Big Ag’s corporate greed that’s driving monarchs closer to EXTINCTION, so here’s your chance: Add your name now to DEMAND that Bayer-Monsanto STOP selling butterfly-harming pesticides immediately! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1713300?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1713301?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This time of year, monarch butterflies come out of hibernation to find a mate during their _**epic 2,500 mile migration**_ back north. And unlike hunting for Easter eggs, there is **only ONE place** that monarchs can lay their eggs: _milkweed plants._
But over the last two decades, **850 million** milkweed plants have vanished. Without milkweed, monarchs have fewer places to reproduce, and baby caterpillars could _**STARVE TO DEATH**_ since it’s their only source of food.
While Roundup _**decimates milkweed**_ and _**threatens the survival of monarchs**_ , Bayer-Monsanto continues to push sales of this butterfly-toxic pesticide -- **even though they know it ISN’T SAFE.** **[We can’t let Big Ag off the hook for any longer, so our pollinators and planet are urgently counting on activists like you, Friend. Will you step up and take action now?](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1713302?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1713301?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking action to save endangered monarchs!
Friends of the Earth**

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | Today, many people are celebrating Easter \-- a holiday that often signifies that spring has officially arrived. While bunnies might be on your mind, they aren’t the only backyard critters that are a beloved staple of this vibrant season. Monarch butterflies, with their iconic bright orange wings, can often be seen among the colorful budding flowers in your home garden. But this spring, you might be seeing far fewer of these backyard beauties -- because monarch populations are DRASTICALLY DECLINING. We have already lost 90% of these ENDANGERED pollinators in large part due to the disappearance of milkweed -- a vital plant for monarch survival and the ONLY source of food for baby monarch caterpillars. Milkweed plants are being WIPED OUT by a toxic chemical called glyphosate , the active ingredient found in Bayer-Monsanto’s Roundup. The pesticide giant has even manipulated science to evade regulations and cover up the truth about the DANGERS of their flagship product. But real environmentalists like you won’t be deceived by Bayer-Monsanto’s harmful lies, Friend. == | == This time of year, monarch butterflies come out of hibernation to find a mate during their epic 2,500 mile migration back north. And unlike hunting for Easter eggs, there is only ONE place that monarchs can lay their eggs: milkweed plants. But over the last two decades, 850 million milkweed plants have vanished. Without milkweed, monarchs have fewer places to reproduce, and baby caterpillars could STARVE TO DEATH since it’s their only source of food. While Roundup decimates milkweed and threatens the survival of monarchs , Bayer-Monsanto continues to push sales of this butterfly-toxic pesticide -- even though they know it ISN’T SAFE. == == Thanks for taking action to save endangered monarchs! Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

| | I wanted to personally share the big news, Peter: **I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada!**

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[_split $15 between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today to become a Founding Donor and help fuel our grassroots movement to victory._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61542418/400420754/1716511289?refcode=20230409.2_JR_4R&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDczNGE0Yy0yMmQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKNTRPcJqO7RI0svIDEvPSVb2z6nTKlIv2ieJOErdTM=)****But first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important:**
1. Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat.
2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points.
3. _The Washington Post_ reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me.

With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada and Georgia, we need to fight back _as early as possible_ to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. **That’s why we set a goal to build the largest team of Reelection Founding Donors as possible – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, Peter:**

[_**So please, will you split $15 between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to become a Founding Donor of our first reelection campaign, win in Nevada, defend Georgia, and hold the Senate for Democrats?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61542419/400420756/1716511289?refcode=20230409.2_JR_4R&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDczNGE0Yy0yMmQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKNTRPcJqO7RI0svIDEvPSVb2z6nTKlIv2ieJOErdTM=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | I wanted to personally share the big news, Peter: I’m officially launching my first reelection campaign for U.S. Senate here in Nevada! In a moment, I’m going to ask you to first, let me explain why your support – right now – is so important: 1. Experts at FiveThirtyEight say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, which means so many Democratic priorities hinge on whether we’re able to defend this crucial battleground seat. 2. Races in Nevada are won and lost by razor-thin margins. The last Senate race here came down to just 7,928 votes – making it the closest in the entire country. Meanwhile, we lost Nevada’s governorship by only 1.5 points. 3. The Washington Post reports that I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024. Now, the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat – and national Republicans have already launched their first wave of attack ads against me. With the GOP setting its sights on Nevada and Georgia, we need to fight back as early as possible to win. And that means showing we have a strong team of grassroots supporters with us. That’s why we set a goal to build the largest team of Reelection Founding Donors as possible – and I’m counting on you to be one of them, Peter: = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you so much, Peter. Your support today is absolutely crucial. I’m grateful. – Jacky Rosen | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Expanding broadband internet in our rural communities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61543209/400423981/1324874474?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230409vilsack_gv_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTgzNWYyNC0zMWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8YrxxN0HroeXn0VzOxzFkiw-MFW0cYbN0oBoh7N5YZg=)
---
Team, This week, we had another special guest visit NM-02: U.S. Department of Agriculture Secretary Tom Vilsack. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61543210/400423982/1324874474?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230409vilsack_gv_180da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTgzNWYyNC0zMWQ3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8YrxxN0HroeXn0VzOxzFkiw-MFW0cYbN0oBoh7N5YZg=)
---
As part of the Biden Administration’s ‘Invest in America’ tour, **Secretary Vilsack announced that New Mexico will receive $40 million in federal funding for broadband internet expansion.**
Thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law passed last year, these projects will help rural communities across our state receive reliable internet connection. It’s about time!
Reliable broadband internet grants New Mexicans greater access to education and healthcare, plus it creates jobs.
We still have a lot of work to do, but this is yet another way that Democrats are delivering and paying attention to the people here in NM-02.

clean_body: | = Team, This week, we had another special guest visit NM-02: U.S. Department of Agriculture Secretary Tom Vilsack. | = As part of the Biden Administration’s ‘Invest in America’ tour, Secretary Vilsack announced that New Mexico will receive $40 million in federal funding for broadband internet expansion. Thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law passed last year, these projects will help rural communities across our state receive reliable internet connection. It’s about time! Reliable broadband internet grants New Mexicans greater access to education and healthcare, plus it creates jobs. We still have a lot of work to do, but this is yet another way that Democrats are delivering and paying attention to the people here in NM-02. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks, Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement.
